title: Death Knight's Twin Axes
text: Golden war axes of the Death Knight . A pair of weapons made to be wielded in both hands. Crackles with lightning , the power of the capital 's ancient dragon cult . The knight, once the personal guard of Godwyn , was also the protector of the Prince of Death 's cadaver surrogate . Unique Skill : Blinkbolt: Twinaxe From a low stance, the body is transformed into a bolt of lightning and charges straight ahead at fulgurous speed. Strong attack performs a lightning-charged spinning slash.

text: The Highland Axe is an Axe , a melee armament in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrading 5 See Also

title: Highland Axe
text: Single-sided axe used by the warriors of the highlands . Brave combatants begin battle by crying out their names. Roars are enhanced by this weapon.

title: Highland Axe
text: Location : Stormveil Castle The Highland Axe is found directly beneath a large painting of Elden Lord Godfrey and Serosh at Stormveil Castle. This area contains a Grafted Scion and may be reached by from the Rampart Tower Site of Grace by descending the nearby elevator.

title: Highland Axe
text: Boosts the strength of roar attacks (such as the enhanced heavy attacks of Barbaric Roar , or the projectile from Beast's Roar ) by 10%. Do note that while this effect is very similar to the boost granted by the Roar Medallion , unlike that Talisman this Axe does not boost the damage of the breath and roar Incantations such as those found among the Dragon Communion Incantations . Similar to how the damage boosts to spells from certain casting implements work, the Highland Axe only grants this boost while held in one of the active hands (left or right, the currently "shown" equipment). The other active piece of equipment can still be two-handed, as the other hand slot will still count as active in the meantime (so having a Highland Axe in the active left hand slot while two-handing a Greatsword in the right hand slot will still grant a damage boost to the Greatsword's War Cry skill.

title: Highland Axe
text: Unlike many other such boosts, wielding two Highland Axes will not stack the boost and it will instead remain at 10%. This item is depicted on the Axe Talisman . This item's proximity to the painting and the description of the Axe Talisman posits Godfrey (Hoarah Loux) and the Tarnished as highlanders.

title: Highland Axe
text: Upgraded with regular Smithing Stones . title: Backhand Blade

title: Backhand Blade

title: Backhand Blade

text: The Curseblade's Cirque is a Backhand Blade , a melee armament in Elden Ring .

title: Curseblade's Cirque
text: Weapon of the masked Curseblades . Circular backhand blade with wave-like cutting edges, sharpened into points that incite blood loss . Long ago, this was employed by the ascetics who strove to become tutelary deities as a ritualistic object in their self-flagellating dances. Unique Skill : Deadly Dance An aggressive spinning skill that tears into foes using the circular blades held in each hand. Additional input allows for a sharp axe-kick follow-up.

title: Curseblade's Cirque
text: It has a 3% chance to be dropped when defeating a Curseblade anywhere in the Realm of Shadow , except for the one perched up on a beam inside the Ancient Ruins of Rauh , which has a 2% to drop this item instead.

title: Red Bear's Claw
text: Claw of a great red bear wielded without modification by Red Bear , whose name is lost to madness. After killing the great red bear in a blood -soaked bout, he became fascinated by the untainted glory of its naked strength . "I wish to be a bear , no more, and no less." Unique Skill : Red Bear Hunt Slaughters prey with sharp claws in a great swipe of the arm. The attack creates a vacuum which deals continuous damage. Repeated inputs allow for up to two follow-up attacks.

text: Dropped by Red Bear in the Northern Nameless Mausoleum .

title: Raptor Talons
text: Claw comprised of two sharp, thin blades. Wielded by the assassins of ravenmount , this weapon allows them to imitate the attacks of Deathbirds . Besides excelling at airborne attacks, its charge attack mimics the vicious swoop of a bird of prey.

title: Raptor Talons
text: Found inside Sage's Cave , located in Altus Plateau . They can be found inside a chest just beyond a room containing four skeletons, hidden behind an illusionary wall.

title: Raptor Talons
text: The Raptor Talons are a pair of Claws that scale primarily with Strength and Dexterity, and attacks with Slashing and Piercing damage , as well as applying Blood Loss to enemies. As the in-game description suggests, the Raptor Talons also do increased damage with jump attacks (roughly 10% more). While they have a somewhat short reach compared to other weapons, the Raptor Talons are fast, lightweight, and come in pairs, with the Tarnished brandishing one set of claws in each hand when wielding the Raptor Talons "two-handed".

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: The Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword is a Colossal Sword , a melee armament in the Elden Ring add-on Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Upgrading 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See Also

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: One of the treasures of the ruined forges . Greatsword of ancient meteoric ore , ending in a sharp point. Fashioned from an excavated shard of an arrowhead that once was a part of the old gods ' arsenal. A capable piercing weapon that excels at thrusting attacks. Unique Skill : White Light Charge Summons white light from the crevice in the weapon's ancient meteoric ore, using its power for a charging attack which pierces foes. Additional input causes the light to explode.

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: Location : Ruined Forge of Starfall Past The Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword is obtained upon examining the forge altar at the Ruined Forge Starfall Past. The altar is found on the second level. To reach the altar, you must pull the lever to make the iron door rise, and use it as a platform to jump across to the second level where the altar is.

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: Upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . Cannot be buffed or infused.

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: This weapon is buffed by the Magic Scorpion Charm however it should be noted that it only increases the innate magic damage present on the weapon and not the full damage produced by the White Light Charge skill. It makes a great use of the Spear Talisman since its moveset consist of many trusting attacks. Leans slightly more towards Strength than Faith , though Faith scaling becomes stronger than Strength after the latter reaches 60. Additionally, Holy damage is easier to increase than Physical .

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: Likely inspired by thunderstones , wherein Neolithic stone tools were mistaken for the weapons of the gods by later discoverers, unaware of human prehistory.

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
text: Clayman's Harpoon Serpent-Hunter

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: Sacred sword of the Gloam-Eyed Queen who controlled the Godskin Apostles before her defeat at the hands of Maliketh . The black flames wielded by the apostles are channeled from this sword. Unique Skill : The Queen's Black Flame Set the blade ablaze with the god -slaying black flame before delivering a sweeping slash. Additional input allows for a follow-up attack. The black flames will continue to wear down HP for a while.

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: This weapon deals Fire damage .

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: Unique Skill : The Queen's Black Flame

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: Location : Divine Tower of Caelid The Godslayer's Greatsword is looted at the bottom of the Divine Tower of Caelid , located in central Greyoll's Dragonbarrow . It is stored within a treasure chest guarded by the Godskin Apostle boss.

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: At +10 this weapon has a D/B/-/C/- scaling.

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: Once wielded by the Gloam-Eyed Queen . Wielded by Vargram the Raging Wolf . Features swirling eddys and a spiral , with a dark purple inlaid gem.

title: Godslayer's Greatsword
text: Update 1.04 increased the guarding effectiveness for each damage affinity from 49/38/49/38/38/36 to 63/38/49/38/38/45.

title: Godslayer's Greatsword

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: The Grafted Blade Greatsword is a Legendary melee armament found in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Effects 3 Acquisition 4 Upgrading 5 Notes 6 Trivia 7 Gallery 8 See also

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: The storied sword of Castle Morne . A revenger 's weapon, it is burdened with oceans of anger and regret. One of the legendary armaments . A lone surviving champion from a country now vanished was so determined to continue fighting that he claimed the swords of an entire clan of warriors. Unique Skill : Oath of Vengeance Swear an oath upon the greatsword to avenge the clan, temporarily raising all attributes for a certain duration. While the oath's effects are active, poise will also be increased.

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: The Attribute boosts from this weapon's unique skill, Oath of Vengeance , is especially useful early on, as it will boost your durability by increasing your Defense and HP , and also increase your Equip Load by roughly 8.0 (about 5.6 if accounting for the 70% threshold for Medium Load) letting you carry it easier. Do keep in mind that while the bonuses to Strength and Dexterity can increase the damage dealt by this weapon's attacks it cannot be used to meet the Attribute requirements as the skill itself is not usable without meeting those requirements.

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: Location : Castle Morne The Grafted Blade Greatsword is obtained upon defeating the Leonine Misbegotten at the Morne Moangrave behind Castle Morne at the southern tip of the Weeping Peninsula .

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: You will need runes and one of each of the ten Somberstones to upgrade this armament to its maximum level.

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: This weapon does not accept weapon buffs . The Grafted Blade Greatsword is one of the nine Legendary Armaments . This is the renowned sword of Castle Morne mentioned by Castellan Edgar . He stresses that this sword must not fall into the hands of the Misbegotten . The fighting lion motif associated with the Golden Lineage appears on the guard, though this detail is difficult to see in-game. While the Dexterity scaling is a good bit stronger than expected it will only exceed the benefits of the Strength scaling when the final softcap of 80 (54 if using both hands) Strength is reached.

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
text: This weapon received several buffs in patch 1.04. Its base damage (+0) was increased from 157 to 162 and its guard rating increaed from 64/48/48/48/48/43 to 80/48/48/48/48/53. This is one of the earliest available Colossal Swords or Weapons and most likely the second acquired after the Zweihander , also found on the Weeping Peninsula . The Chinese and Korean version 1.00 release of the game preserve a very different earlier draft of this item description, roughly translating to " A special greatsword created by joining together the swords of warriors who once served Godfrey . It is imbued with the power of the Rune of Grafting. " [ 1 ]

title: Grafted Blade Greatsword

title: Greatsword
text: A coarse iron lump of an ultra greatsword . Mows down foes by utilizing its incredible weight . Though handling it likely requires the wielder to have surpassed the realm of the merely human , it is precisely for this reason the weapon is used to slaughter even inhuman foes.

title: Greatsword
text: Looted from the black carriage directly northwest of Caelem Ruins in Caelid .

title: Greatsword
text: Despite the name implying that it is a Greatsword , it is actually classified as a Colossal Sword .

title: Greatsword
text: This weapon's guard rating was significantly increased with patch 1.04, from 67/50/50/50/50/38 to 84/50/50/50/50/56. The Greatsword is a reminiscent of the weapon Dragon Slayer that Guts wields in Berserk .

title: Greatsword of Radahn (Light)
text: Greatswords of black steel wielded by Radahn in his youth. A pair of weapons decorated with a lion mane motif. These were in his possession immediately before his triumph over the stars - the swords of a lord who does not rely on physical strength and gravity alone. Unique Skill : Lightspeed Slash Assume a luminous form and leap forward to deliver a downward slash at the speed of light . This attack will be followed up by an additional light attack. Charge to increase power of the skill and number of follow-up attacks.

title: Greatsword of Radahn (Light)
text: Can be obtained upon trading the Remembrance of a God and a Lord with Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold .

title: Greatsword of Radahn (Light)

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: Maliketh's Black Blade is a Colossal Sword , a melee armament in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 Upgrading 6 See Also

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: Maliketh 's black blade which once harbored the power of the Rune of Death . A sad shadow of its former glory. After a fragment of Death was stolen on that fateful night , Maliketh bound the blade within his own flesh, such that none might ever rob Death again. Unique Skill : Destined Death Set free the remnants of Destined Death , plunging the greatsword into the ground to summon a myriad of blades. In addition to dealing immediate damage, this attack reduces the enemy's maximum HP and continues to wear down HP for a short time.

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: The blade is acquired by using the Remembrance of the Black Blade , gained by defeating Maliketh, The Black Blade in Crumbling Farum Azula near the end of the game, with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: Only the Unique Skill applies the Destined Death effect. Of average length for a Colossal Sword. Leans slightly more towards Strength than Faith , though Faith scaling becomes stronger than Strength after the latter reaches 60. Additionally, Holy damage is easier to increase than Physical .

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: This weapon's guard rating was significantly increased in patch 1.04, from 51/36/36/36/49/38 to 68/36/36/36/49/55. It is still on the lower end when it comes to colossal sword guard ratings. Patch 1.09 increase this weapon's scaling values.

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: Upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . Cannot be buffed or infused.

title: Maliketh's Black Blade
text: Black Blade , the spell variant Black Knife , another weapon imbued with Destined Death (Status Effect) . Blasphemous Claw Fingerslayer Blade God Hunt Godslayer's Greatsword

title: Anvil Hammer
text: One of the treasures of the ruined forges . A tremendous hammer that incorporates as its head the red-hot anvil of the forge. It is said that the anvil's shape is inspired by that of an altar, and that long ago, it was indeed used as such in rite and ritual. Unique Skill : Smithing Art Spears Slam the red-hot anvil into the ground, sending up countless spears as it is pulled out. The spears disappear instantly.

title: Anvil Hammer
text: This weapon can be found and obtained at the altar at the end of the Ruined Forge Lava Intake .

title: Anvil Hammer
text: The art of smithing was a divine art practiced by Golem Smiths , Trolls , and Fire Giants . The Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword was another treasure of the forges.

text: Brick Hammer Hammer Smithing Table Smithing Talisman Smithscript Greathammer Troll's Hammer Verdigris Discus

title: Axe of Godfrey
text: Weapon of Godfrey , Elden Lord . It was broken in a battle fought as leader of the Tarnished during the Long March . This weapon is symbolic of Godfrey's vow to conduct himself as a lord , later becoming an emblem of the golden lineage . In the days of the past, a crown was warranted with strength . Unique Skill: Regal Roar Let loose a mighty war cry , raising attack power , while sending out a shockwave that cannot be guarded against by stomping the ground. While active, strong attack becomes a lunging slash.

title: Axe of Godfrey
text: Trade the Remembrance of Hoarah Loux , dropped by Hoarah Loux, Warrior , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Bloodfiend's Arm
text: Guaranteed drop from a Bloodfiend wielding one in the ruins of Prospect Town on the western cliffs of Gravesite Plain . The ruins are reached by going east from the Main Gate Cross Site of Grace before Belurat, Tower Settlement and then turning south along the cliff wall before going through the archway.

title: Devonia's Hammer

A torrent of life is engraved upon the striking face. Unique Skill : Devonia's Vortex Using the power of the Crucible vortex , violently spin the hammer around and slam the ground, causing a shockwave. This skill can be charged to increase its power.

title: Envoy's Greathorn
text: Fanned golden horn of the Oracle Envoys . Profoundly weighty , its blows are sure to be felt. Originally an instrument, but one that cannot be sounded by a mere human . Or perhaps it is too early to sound the call. Unique Skill : Great Oracular Bubble Blow on the horn to release a massive magic bubble. The bubble floats gently through the air towards its target.

title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
text: The Fallingstar Beast Jaw is a Colossal Weapon , a melee armament in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 Upgrading 6 See Also

title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
text: Part of a Fallingstar Beast 's jaw, hard and shining black, fashioned into a weapon. With its sharp point, this colossal weapon can skewer foes. Unique Skill : Gravity Bolt Imbue the jaw of the fallingstar beast with gravitational lightning sending a bolt crashing down a short distance away. Can be fired in rapid succession.

title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
text: Acquired by defeating the Full-Grown Fallingstar Beast boss in a large crater on a peak on Mt. Gelmir , south of the Ninth Mt. Gelmir Campsite grace.

title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
text: Has a 20% damage bonus against Gravity -affinity enemies. Does best when used on a hybrid Strength / Dexterity build as both scales equally well for both the weapon's damage and the skill's damage. The Intelligence -scaling, on the other hand, provide very minimal benefits overall to both the weapoon and the skill. The skill is mostly Physical damage with a side of Magic damage, both scaling the same way as the weapon itself does.

title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
text: Patch 1.08 decreased poise damage dealt by this weapon (Colossal Weapons more specifically) and greatly decreased the Stance damage dealt by the skill, from 33 (on par with a dual-wielded jump attack of this weapon) to 7 (less than half of that of a light attack). Patch 1.09 increased this weapon's scaling values.

title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
text: Upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . Cannot be buffed or have its affinity changed with Ashes of War .

title: Bloodhound's Fang
text: Curved greatsword with a gently undulating blade wielded by Bloodhound Knights . A fearsome blade capable of brutal airborne attacks. Unique Skill : Bloodhound's Finesse Slash upwards with the Bloodhound's Fang, using the momentum of the strike to perform a backwards somersault and gain some distance from foes. Follow up with a strong attack to perform the Bloodhound's Step attack.

title: Freyja's Greatsword
text: Weapon of Freyja , a Redmane . Greatsword decorated with a mane , much like the weapons used by her liege . The spirit of Freyja's training lingers in this sword, enhancing the power of Redmane battle skills .

title: Freyja's Greatsword
text: This weapon can be obtainable wherever Redmane Freyja dies. If you gave her Freyja's Letter , you can find Freyja's Greatsword on her body after defeating her during the boss against Needle Knight Leda and her allies. Otherwise, it can be found by the Storehouse, Seventh Floor Sites of Grace after defeating Leda and her allies.

title: Freyja's Greatsword
text: The damage of the following Redmane skills is increased by 10% when this weapon is held in one of a player's two active hand slots: Flame of the Redmanes , Lion's Claw , Roaring Bash , and Savage Lion's Claw . In PVP, the damage is only increased by 7%.

title: Freyja's Greatsword
text: Freyja's Armor Golden Lion Shield Greatsword of Radahn (Light) Greatsword of Radahn (Lord) Starscourge Greatsword

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword
text: The Horned Warrior's Greatsword is a Curved Greatsword , a melee armament in the Elden Ring add-on Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree .

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword
text: Curved greatsword of the horned warriors , keepers of the tower . A heavy weapon made to bring the deft strength of the warriors to bear. The ornamental tangled horns allow the blade to serve as a medium for horn-calling . Unique Skill : Horn Calling: Storm Invokes tangled horns to cover the weapon's blade. Call a storm into the horns, then mow through enemies. Additional inputs allow for up to two follow-up attacks.

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword
text: Can be dropped from the Wind-aspected Horned Warrior towards the end of Enir-Ilim on the bridge to the Cleansing Chamber Anteroom Site of Grace .

title: Horned Warrior's Greatsword
text: Divine Beast Helm Horned Warrior Helm Horned Warrior's Sword

title: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword
text: The Magma Wyrm's Scalesword is a Curved Greatsword , a melee armament in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Upgrading 4 See Also

title: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword
text: Curved greatsword wielded by Magma Wyrms . The shape resembles a dragon 's jaw and is covered in hard scales. It's said these land-bound dragons were once human heroes who partook in dragon communion , a grave transgression for which they were cursed to crawl the earth upon their bellies, shadows of their former selves. Unique Skill : Magma Guillotine Grab the scalesword with both hands, as a wyrm would hold it in its mouth, and leap forwards, smashing it into the ground and triggering a blast of magma . Follow up with an additional input to perform a chopping attack.

title: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword
text: Received upon defeating Magma Wyrm Makar boss inside the Ruin-Strewn Precipice , accessed from Liurnia of the Lakes .

title: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword
text: You will need runes and one of each of the ten Somberstones to upgrade this armament to its maximum level.

title: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword

Unique Skill : Cursed-Blood Slice Brace, then charge forward to deliver a downward diagonal slice. The bloody trail of the blade is followed by a burst of flame . Additional input allows for a follow-up attack.

title: Morgott's Cursed Sword
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Omen King , gained by defeating Morgott, the Omen King , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums with a bell to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Dancing Blade of Ranah
text: Decorative swords ablaze with impassioned red. A pair of weapons made to be wielded in both hands. Used by the dancers of Ranah . Strike enemies with a dancing assault when executing a strong attack. Unique Skill : Unending Dance A furious dance formed by a succession of slashing attacks . Hold the button down to sustain the dance for as long as stamina allows.

text: Can be obtained when dropped by the Dancer of Ranah at the Southern Nameless Mausoleum .

text: The Eclipse Shotel is a Curved Sword , a melee armament in Elden Ring . It is one of the legendary armaments .

title: Eclipse Shotel
text: Storied sword and treasure of Castle Sol that depicts an eclipsed sun drained of color. One of the legendary armaments . In Sol, the sight of an eclipse inspires a dreadful awe, preventing an onlooker from averting his gaze. Unique Skill : Death Flare Set the lusterless sun ablaze with the Prince of Death 's flames , inflicting the death ailment upon foes. Follow up with an additional input to bring down the armament, triggering an explosion.

title: Eclipse Shotel
text: Castle Sol , in the Church of the Eclipse where there is also a grace .

title: Falx
text: Curved swords with long sickle -like blades. A pair of weapons made to be wielded in both hands. Forged by a hornsent in the name of revenge . "In vengeance for the flames , my blade I wield..." Unique Skill : Revenger's Blade Dash up to an enemy and slash them open with the blades held in each hand. By holding down the button, the initial slash will be extended. Follow up with strong attack to hack the enemy to pieces.

title: Falx
text: It can be obtained wherever Hornsent is killed, depending on your actions and choices.

title: Falx
text: Falx was a real-world weapon with a curved blade sharpened along the inner edge, used by the Thracians and Dacians in antiquity. The name derives from the Latin word falx , originally meaning "sickle", though it later came to refer to various tools with sickle-like blades.

title: Black Knife
text: Black Knife is a melee armament found in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrade Information 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Black Knife
text: Dagger once belonging to one of the assassins who murdered Godwyn the Golden on the Night of the Black Knives . A ritual performed on the oddly misshapen blade imbued it with the power of the stolen Rune of Death . Unique Skill : Blade of Death Unleash the power of the Rune of Death to fire off a blade-like projectile. In addition to dealing immediate damage, the blade reduces the enemy's maximum HP and continues to wear down HP for a while.

title: Black Knife
text: Received upon defeating the Black Knife Assassin in front of Sainted Hero's Grave located in Altus Plateau .

title: Black Knife
text: Technically leans towards a pure (80) Dexterity build with its scaling, but practically speaking a hybrid (45/45) Dexterity/ Faith build gains about as much Attack Power (AP) while also making the skill stronger since it only scales with weapon upgrade level and the user's Faith. Effectively, the hybrid build loses about 2% AP compared to the pure build (494 AP vs 503 AP) in exchange for gaining about 13% more AP for the initial hit of the skill (969 AP vs 856 AP). Despite its often resisted Holy damage this weapon still pulls its weight well due to the percentage-based damage effect its skill also causes, even when dodged through. This health drain effect triggers even when rolled through so to fully avoid it can't be allowed to touch your body when dodged. Has a unique double-hitting heavy attack shared with the Blade of Calling , Erdsteel Dagger , and Fire Knight's Shortsword .

title: Black Knife
text: This unique attack grants 4 points towards the scaling of the Winged Sword Insignias instead of the usual 2 due to hitting twice.

title: Black Knife
text: Upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . Cannot have its Affinity and Skill changed. The upper number in the Atk column denotes Physical base damage while the lower, colored number in the Atk column denotes elemental base damage: red for Fire damage, yellow for Lightning damage, orange for Holy damage, and cyan for Magic damage. See the Weapon Scaling page for what the scaling values mean. title: Blade of Calling
text: Blade of Calling attribute requirements and scaling — Requires: Strength 6, Dexterity 13, Faith 15; Scaling: Strength D, Dexterity D, Faith C

title: Blade of Calling
text: Blade of Calling is a melee armament found in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrade Information 5 Trivia 6 See Also

title: Blade of Calling
text: Dagger given to one who set out on a journey to fulfill her duty long ago. The power of its former owner, the kindling maiden , is still apparent. The one who walks alongside flame , Shall one day meet the road of Destined Death . Unique Skill : Blade of Gold Leap into the air, charging the armament with golden flames that are then shot at the enemy as a single, blade-like projectile. Inflicts holy damage.

title: Blade of Calling
text: Loot: Forbidden Lands Hidden within a room that you can only reach during the elevator ride that leads down to the Forbidden Lands grace, alongside the Official's Attire . Jump from the southwestern part of the elevator to a doorway just above the bottom floor.

title: Blade of Calling
text: While its Faith -scaling is technically the strongest its Dexterity -scaling is effectively almost equal to it because the dagger's Physical base Attack Power is higher than its Holy base Attack Power. An equal split between Dexterity and Faith will give the most Attack Power (AP), though a pure Dexterity build or a pure Faith build will get only about 5% less AP. Since the skill scales with weapon upgrade level and Faith but not Dexterity or Strength , it can be beneficial to lean into the pure Faith build, or even a 45/45 or 30/60 Dex/Fth split. A pure Faith (80) build gives 1138 Holy Attack Power, 13% more Attack Power on the skill than hybrid Dexterity/Faith (45/45) build's 1010 Holy Attack Power and 5.5% more Attack Power than the skill of a Faith-leaning Dexterity/Faith (30/60) build's 1079 Holy Attack Power. Unfortunately generally outclassed by the Black Knife .

title: Blade of Calling
text: While this weapon is 0.5 units lighter, has better scaling, and its skill deals more outright damage at a lower FP cost, the Black Knife will always have more AP due to higher base Attack Power, is attainable much earlier in the game, and the skill is often more damaging due to part of its damage being percentage-based. Has a unique double-hitting heavy attack shared with the Black Knife , Erdsteel Dagger , and Fire Knight's Shortsword . This unique attack grants 4 points towards the scaling of the Winged Sword Insignias instead of the usual 2 due to hitting twice.

See the Weapon Scaling page for what the scaling values mean. title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: Bloodstained Dagger — Type: Dagger; Attack type: / Slash / Pierce; Effects: Causes blood loss buildup (38); Skill: Quickstep; FP cost: 3; Weight: 2.0; Sell price: 100; Tradeable: Yes

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: Bloodstained Dagger attribute requirements and scaling — Requires: Strength 9 (8 two-handed), Dexterity 12; Scaling: Strength C, Dexterity E

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: The Bloodstained Dagger is a Dagger in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrade Information 5 See Also

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: Dagger with a bloodstained blade. Afflicts targets with blood loss . As blood darkened the dagger through repeated slashing and stabbing , its blade only grew sharper and harder.

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: 2% drop rate from Fierce Demi-Humans aka Demi-Human Chiefs. One can point asleep next to the bridge west of the South of the Lookout Tower Site of Grace.

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: Strong Strength - and Arcane -scaling. Surpasses all daggers except the rather unusual Wakizashi for raw damage on a Heavy affinity and has the highest Strength-scaling of them all, just short of an S-rating. Second or third strongest dagger on the Occult affinity, though it will only slightly outmatch the Reduvia (only by 1 point) and the latter will have more Blood Loss build-up. Pairs well with the extra status build-up from Cold and Occult affinities: the former for the added Frostbite build-up and the latter for the added scaling to the Blood Loss build-up. Despite this its Heavy affinity actually gives it slightly weaker Strength -scaling for "bullet"-type (i.e. doesn't scale directly with the used weapon's damage) Skills with a Heavy, Quality, or Fire affinity, giving them usually about 2% less damage than they otherwise would have.

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: This includes, as an example, the skills Ground Slam , Storm Blade , and Flame of the Redmanes (these skills however perform as normal on any affinity besides Heavy). The innate Blood Loss build-up scales with any Arcane-scaling granted by affinities (Poison, Blood, and Occult). While the Blood affinity grants the exact same amount of build-up and scaling as with any other dagger, it does cause the Blood Loss procs to deal an extra 100 flat damage. The only dagger with a Strength focus on its Cold affinity instead of a Dexterity focus.

title: Bloodstained Dagger
text: Upgraded with regular Smithing Stones . Can have its Affinity and Skill changed. All non-physical Affinities lower all types of guarded damage negation by 5%, except for the associated element where the damage negation increases by 25% and another element also increases by 15%. Magic negation receives the secondary 15% negation bonus on Sacred and Cold affinities, Fire negation gets the increase on Lightning affinity, Lightning negation gets the increase on Fire and Flame Art affinities, and Holy negation gets the increase on Magic affinity. The upper number in the Atk column denotes Physical base damage while the lower, colored number in the Atk column denotes elemental base damage: red for Fire damage, yellow for Lightning damage, orange for Holy damage, and cyan for Magic damage. See the Weapon Scaling page for what the scaling values mean.

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: Celebrant's Sickle — Type: Dagger; Attack type: / Slash / Pierce; Skill: Quickstep; FP cost: 3; Weight: 1.5; Sell price: 100; Tradeable: Yes

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: Celebrant's Sickle attribute requirements and scaling — Requires: Strength 6, Dexterity 11; Scaling: Strength E, Dexterity C

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: The Celebrant's Sickle is a Dagger in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrade Information 5 Trivia 6 See Also 7 References

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: Sickle decorated with flowers and many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula . Its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard . Crafted from human bone . Grants trace amounts of runes on landing attacks.

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: Location : Altus Plateau Celebrant's Sickle has a 0.5% random chance to drop from blue-garbed Dominula Dancers that wield it in Dominula, Windmill Village , located on the Altus Plateau. Two of them are found a bit east of the Windmill Village Site of Grace .

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: This weapon is wielded by the young maidens who play a central role in the festival. [ 1 ] Grants 10 Runes every time an enemy is hit. The strongest dagger for the Keen affinity, with its A being just on the verge of an S-scaling. Otherwise somewhat subpar or average when it comes to damage, including the otherwise Dexterity -scaling Lightning and Cold affinities. Despite this its Keen affinity actually gives it slightly weaker Dexterity-scaling for "bullet"-type (i.e. doesn't scale directly with the used weapon's damage) Skills with a Keen, Quality, Lightning, or Cold affinity, giving them usually about 2% less damage than they otherwise would have. This includes, as an example, the skills Beast's Roar , Storm Blade , Thunderbolt , and Hoarfrost Stomp (these skills however perform as normal on any affinity besides Keen).

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: All attacks ignore 50% of guarded damage negation, though the dagger's low Attack Power may make it appear to be lower than that. Pairs well with non-physical affinities such as Magic since those are usually already only partially negated by guarding and the ignored guarding damage negation applies to all forms of damage, not just Physical . As a dagger it will bounce away when hitting Medium Shields and Greatshields which means the weapon should preferably be used two-handed when attacking against those so that the guard-piercing can be fully exploited.

title: Celebrant's Sickle
text: Upgraded with regular Smithing Stones . Can have its Affinity and Skill changed. All non-physical Affinities lower all types of guarded damage negation by 5%, except for the associated element where the damage negation increases by 25% and another element also increases by 15%. Magic negation receives the secondary 15% negation bonus on Sacred and Cold affinities, Fire negation gets the increase on Lightning affinity, Lightning negation gets the increase on Fire and Flame Art affinities, and Holy negation gets the increase on Magic affinity. The upper number in the Atk column denotes Physical base damage while the lower, colored number in the Atk column denotes elemental base damage: red for Fire damage, yellow for Lightning damage, orange for Holy damage, and cyan for Magic damage. See the Weapon Scaling page for what the scaling values mean.

title: Cinquedea

title: Cinquedea
text: Cinquedea attribute requirements and scaling — Requires: Strength 10 (8 two-handed), Dexterity 10; Scaling: Strength D, Dexterity E

title: Cinquedea
text: The Cinquedea is a Dagger melee armament in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Effects 2.1 Skill 3 Acquisition 4 Upgrading 5 Notes 6 Trivia 7 See also

title: Cinquedea
text: Short sword given to high ranking clergymen of Farum Azula . Raises potency of bestial incantations . The design celebrates a beast 's five fingers , symbolic of the intelligence once granted upon their kind.

title: Cinquedea
text: Scales with Strength ( D ) and ( E ) Boosts the power of Bestial Incantations by 10% Cannot change Affinity This weapon cannot be buffed.

title: Cinquedea
text: Skill cannot be changed Skill: Quickstep

title: Cinquedea
text: Location : Bestial Sanctum (exterior) The Cinquedea is looted from a mummified Beastman behind the Bestial Sanctum in Greyoll's Dragonbarrow . Descend onto roots from the north-facing cliff behind the Bestial Sanctum, located on the west side of the building. Carefully jump from the roots onto the domes of the pillars, before carefully dropping along the pillar to the row of pit graves. Travel down to the third row, and reach fhe platform with four chained Beastmen. Rainbow Stones can be used to determine the safety of a fall. Found on the same level as the Dragoncrest Shield Talisman

title: Cinquedea
text: Bolstering Material: Somber Smithing Stones Bolstering cost: ?

title: Cinquedea
text: Sell value: 500 Requires 10 Strength (8 if two-handed ) and 10 Dexterity to be used effectively Gurranq, Beast Clergyman , also known as Maliketh, the Black Blade , wields the Cinquedea, affirming its connection to Shadowbound Beasts and the Two Fingers . This is the second longest dagger, being ever so slightly outmatched by the Miséricorde . The Clawmark Seal can be held in the other hand to stack the Bestial Incantation boost to 21% . Very good Strength -scaling. While a pure Strength build may seem the best idea for this dagger this is somewhat compromised by the fact that it seems intended to be paired with the Clawmark Seal. Instead, a slightly uneven 60/30 split for Strength and Faith may be better to preserve most of the dagger's damage while still gaining good scaling on the Seal.

title: Cinquedea
text: Having Quickstep as its skill is actually quite beneficial as it lets the user reposition quickly before or after casting a spell. Paired with alternating between quick casts of Bestial Vitality and swift dagger swipes and you have a decent setup.

title: Cinquedea
text: The name cinquedea means "five fingers" in Italian, referring to the width of the blade at the handle.

title: Crystal Knife

title: Crystal Knife
text: The Crystal Knife is a Dagger in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrade Information 5 Trivia 6 See Also

title: Crystal Knife
text: A knife made by sharpening hard crystal . Signature weapon of glintstone miners . Used as tool to extract glintstone from broken rock, and as such a faint magic enwreathes the blade.

title: Crystal Knife
text: Found in a chest inside the Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel located in Liurnia of the Lakes . After taking the first elevator after the Site of Grace down and walking across a wooden beam it is inside the second room on the right, guarded by two distracted Marionette Soldiers .

title: Crystal Knife
text: Unusually for a weapon upgraded with Smithing Stones , this weapon cannot be buffed or have its affinity changed. The scaling favors an equal split between Strength and Intelligence , with the higher Physical base damage making the Strength-scaling more equivalent to the technically higher Intelligence-scaling. Surprisingly only 20 points/5% of total Attack Power behind when focused purely on Strength or Intelligence, or hybridizing Strength/Intelligence, Strength/ Dexterity , or Dexterity/Intelligence. Decent raw damage but the unusual, for a dagger anyway, lack of a critical multiplier means it ends up being outclassed by all of the other daggers, especially the Dagger and the Miséricorde , for the purpose of critical hits. Pairs well with a Magic or Cold affinity Bloodstained Dagger due to its also scaling well with Strength.

title: Crystal Knife
text: Upgraded with regular Smithing Stones . Cannot have its Affinity or Skill changed. title: Dagger
text: The Dagger is a Dagger in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrade Information

title: Dagger
text: A standard dagger with a straight blade. Though modest in reach and capacity for harm, this weapon is light enough to jab in rapid succession and delivers devastating critical hits .

title: Dagger
text: 1 sold by the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold for 400 Runes 4% drop chance from dagger-wielding enemies ( Highwaymen , Godrick Foot Soldiers , Raya Lucaria Foot Soldiers , Radahn Foot Soldiers , Leyndell Foot Soldiers , Haligtree Foot Soldiers , and Messmer Foot Soldiers ). A good early farming spot is all the Highwaymen at the beginning of Murkwater Cave .

title: Dagger
text: Together with the Rapier this weapon has the second strongest critical multiplier at 130 (the Miséricorde has the highest, at 140). Has low enough requirements to be used with any starting class's default attributes and is fairly common, making it a decent secondary weapon for backstabbing and other critical hits, especially for those who don't have the stats to wield the Miséricorde. Generally Dexterity -leaning on its affinities and performs best on a Keen affinity (having scaling just short of S-tier scaling) but also works surprisingly well with the Occult affinity, even if it lacks any of the innate Status Effects required to truly take advantage of this. Despite this its Keen affinity actually gives it slightly weaker Dexterity-scaling for "bullet"-type (i.e.

title: Dagger
text: doesn't scale directly with the used weapon's damage) Skills with a Keen, Quality, Lightning, or Cold affinity, giving them usually about 2% less damage than they otherwise would have. This includes, as an example, the skills Beast's Roar , Storm Blade , Thunderbolt , and Hoarfrost Stomp (these skills however perform as normal on any affinity besides Keen). The shortest of all daggers.

title: Duchess' Dagger
text: A dagger carried by the Duchess known to symbolize the virtue of her family. Though she was not born into her adopted house, she was welcomed into it with open arms. And though unrelated by blood, the nobility and righteousness of her clan took root within her heart. Unique Skill : Magic Dagger Slash with magic -enwreathed blade. The magic coating lasts for some time.

title: Cipher Pata

title: Cipher Pata
text: One of the weapons originating from the Two Fingers . A formless sequence of ciphers comprise its blade, and as such no shield can repel it. Deals holy damage . The furtive inscription appears to hang in the air; the language of light spoken by the Two Fingers. Unique Skill : Unblockable Blade Imbue the cipher blade with light, then lunge forward with a sudden piercing attack . This attack cannot be blocked.

title: Madding Hand (weapon)
text: A glove stitched together from the flayed skin of the victims of a butcherous bloodbath. Afflicts target with madness . Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity. Forged of an unyielding, black impulse toward revenge fostered in those who were hunted down as heretics by their own brethren , these are the weapons of the utterly downtrodden. Unique Skill : Madding Spear-Hand Strike Makes hand into the shape of a spear before unleashing a plunging stab that penetrates the body of the enemy. Afflicts foe with a large dose of madness.

title: Bastard's Stars
text: Bastard's Stars is a melee armament found in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Upgrading 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Bastard's Stars
text: Flail which deals magic damage , having been imbued with power by the remembrance of Astel . Formed of the same many-colored star debris that comprised the form of the Naturalborn of the Void . Unique Skill : Nebula Imbue the Naturalborn's stars with magic to perform a sweeping strike. This attack leaves a dark cloud of stars in its wake that lingers briefly before exploding.

title: Bastard's Stars
text: Trade Remembrance of the Naturalborn , dropped by Astel, Naturalborn of the Void , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Bastard's Stars
text: Has a 20% damage bonus against Gravity -affinity enemies. As a Flail , this weapon can't be parried. Scales strongly with Intelligence . This weapon's version is a bit different than the one used with Wing of Astel , instead being a swing that launches the wielder forward while spreading out a cloud that explodes a second later. The Bastard's Stars weapon design is loaded with symbolic imagery. Astel formed in the Greater Will 's lightless abyss , and the icon depicts a skeletal finger protruding from a void. The finger bones extend from a starry, knot-like cluster of blue, green, and purple orbs. Wispy white filaments trail from the clump, and a small bony spur sprouts from its surface like a horn . A procession of stars follows from the mass, culminating in dark concentric rings.

title: Bastard's Stars
text: The orange-hued stars likely represent primordial gold and amber -hued stars, which dictate the fates of the gods . "Many-colored" is otherwise only used to describe the flowers adorning the Dominula Celebrants ' weapons and Festive Hoods .

title: Bastard's Stars
text: Upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . Cannot be buffed or infused with Ashes of War .

title: Bastard's Stars
text: The Bastard's Stars portrays a Finger of God .

title: Bastard's Stars
text: Bone-Like Stone Wing of Astel , the other Astel weapon with the Nebula skill.

title: Family Heads
text: Three bludgeoning copper heads attached to a handle by chains. Signature weapon of Necromancer Garris , the heretical sage . The heads were made to resemble those of his wife and two children. Unique Skill : Familial Rancor Gently rattle the copper heads to summon vengeful spirits that chase down foes. The anguish of a spouse and children invites accursed wrath.

title: Family Heads
text: Received upon defeating Necromancer Garris , who is found behind an illusory wall inside the Sage's Cave , located in Altus Plateau .

title: Family Heads
text: While the weapon itself mostly scales with Dexterity , the skill actually scales with Intelligence and quite strongly at that in spite of the weapon's own E to D scaling for that Attribute . The Strength requirement is 8, which is the lowest the Attribute can go. As a Flail , this weapon can't be parried. Curiously enough, the skill does not consume Stamina upon casting, not even in combat.

title: Family Heads
text: This weapon is upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . Can't be buffed or infused.

title: Family Heads
text: The Attributes scaling for the weapon when upgraded to +10 spells out DAD, which might be a reference to how Garris himself is a father and how the weapon was made to resemble his lost family.

Concerned over the lazy arrogance with which the monks treated the Flame, Birac severed his own head as a lesson to the others, intending it to be used as a candlestand. His faith yet smolders from within the cranial vessel. Unique Skill : Surge of Faith Set the flames of Birac's faith ablaze in the cranial vessel, then raise it aloft to rain down fireballs in all directions. Repeated inputs will continue to raise the armament aloft, continuing the attack.

title: Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana
text: Great katana with spines of gravel stone along its blade, wielded by the Ancient Dragon-Man of the Dragon's Pit . Has an anti-dragon effect. Formerly a Dragon Communion warrior, the Ancient Dragon-Man was once arbiter of those worthy to devour the Dreaded One . Unique Skill : Dragonwound Slash Designed to hunt colossal dragons , this skill cloaks the armament with a jagged gravel-stone aura before performing a high leaping slash . Charge the attack to also fire off the aura.

title: Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana
text: Location : Dragon's Pit The Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana is obtained upon defeating the Ancient Dragon-Man at the bottom of the Dragon's Pit .

title: Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana

title: Rakshasa's Great Katana
text: A great katana with the tempering pattern of its blade forever stained red with blood . Weapon of Rakshasa , who cuts down and devours. A berserker's weapon used to endure enemy attacks and reply with one's full fury. When attacking, the wielder is less likely to stagger from counterattacks , but will also take increased damage. Unique Skill : Weed Cutter Performs scythe -like horizontal swings with the sword, cutting men down as if they were weeds. Additional inputs allow for the continuation of the attack for as long as stamina remains.

title: Rakshasa's Great Katana
text: Gained by defeating Rakshasa in the Eastern Nameless Mausoleum .

title: Rakshasa's Great Katana
text: When attacking the wielder gains Poise , but also suffers a 10% increase in damage taken.

title: Barbed Staff-Spear
text: Greatstaff of Jori, elder inquisitor . The tip bristles with golden barbs symbolic of the inquisition 's torture, allowing one to wield the staff as a greatspear. Attacks deal holy damage , and potency increases with faith . Unique Skill : Jori's Inquisition Thrust the greatstaff into the air, firing off a succession of golden barb-like arcs . Holding the button down extends the barrage for a short duration.

title: Barbed Staff-Spear
text: Guaranteed drop from Jori, Elder Inquisitor , found at the end of the Darklight Catacombs .

title: Bloodfiend's Sacred Spear
text: Greatspear of the bloodfiend hexers . One of the most significant implements used in their blood rituals . Sacred spears of blood are the instruments of communion with an outer god . The mother of truth desires a wound. Unique Skill : Bloodfiends' Bloodboon Raise the sacred spear and pierce the body of the mother of truth, creating an explosion of bloodflame in the area surrounding the target. Additional input allows for up to three follow-up attacks.

text: Guaranteed drop from a Bloodfiend Hexer in Rauh Base . It can be found in a shallow pond to the west of Taylew's Ruined Forge .

title: Mohgwyn's Sacred Spear
text: Trident of Mohg, Lord of Blood . A sacred spear that will come to symbolize his dynasty . As well as serving as a weapon , it is an instrument of communion with an outer god who bestows power upon accursed blood . The mother of truth desires a wound. Unique Skill : Bloodboon Ritual Raise the sacred spear and pierce the body of the Formless Mother . Stab up to three times, creating explosions of blood with each thrust. This skill will coat the armament with bloodflame for a while.

title: Mohgwyn's Sacred Spear
text: Causes blood loss buildup (55)

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: The Serpent-Hunter is a Great Spear , a melee armament in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 See Also

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: Weapon that serves as both greatsword and spear . Thought to have been used to hunt an immortal great serpent in the distant past, it manifests a long blade of light when facing such a creature. When their master 's heroic aspirations degenerated into mere greed, his men searched for a weapon with which they might halt their lord . Unique Skill : Great-Serpent Hunt Perform a powerful forward lunge and follow up with an upward thrust via additional input. When fighting a great serpent, a long blade of light will appear, revealing the armament's true power.

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: Mt. Gelmir (Volcano Manor) Loot: Can be picked up within the boss arena of Praetor Rykard , just after the fog gate. This item does not re-spawn when the player has one in either their inventory or chest, even in NG+. However it will re-spawn (and thus can be picked up again) from the same location should the player discard it. This is to make sure that the player always have the means of fighting Rykard with it. Because of this safeguard it is still possible to obtain duplicates of this weapon: Requirements: The player needs to not have a copy it in their inventory. Rykard needs to still be alive. The game needs to be in online-mode. 1) Stand outside Rykard's arena and attempt to connect to another player's world through any means necessary.

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: ( Tarnished's Furled Finger , Duelist's Furled Finger , Bloody Finger , Recusant Finger , Festering Bloody Finger or Blue Cipher Ring ) 2) When the game has successfully found a world it can try to connect to, enter Rykard's arena and pick up the Serpent-Hunter before the Loading Screen appears. 3) Leave the multiplayer session either by completing your objective or using the Finger Severer . 4) When you re-spawn back in your own world, do not fast travel or rest at the Sites of Grace , instead enter Rykard's arena again and you'll see the Serpent Hunter is still there, available to be picked up again for a second time.

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: (Traveling or resting at the site of grace will make the game check if the Serpent-Hunter is in your inventory before it decides if it'll spawn in a new one for you to pick up) It's possible to obtain even more copies of this weapon if the player simply loops back to step 1 after finishing step 3.

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: The Serpent-Hunter's special effect only activates when fighting the God-Devouring Serpent and Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy . It does not activate against Base Serpent Messmer or other serpents .

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: The Serpent Hunter strongly resembles the Dragonslayer Swordspear wielded by the Nameless King in FromSoftware’s previous game Dark Souls III . The shape of the weapon's blade resembles the Karasawa laser rifle from FromSoftware's mecha series Armored Core .

title: Serpent-Hunter
text: Man-Serpent Serpent-God's Curved Sword Storm Ruler Volcano Manor Apparition

title: Siluria's Tree
text: Siluria 's Tree , weapon of one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights . The primordial form of the Erdtree is close in nature to life itself, and this spear , modeled on its crucible , is imbued with ancient holy essence. Unique Skill : Siluria's Woe Thrust the weapon in a spiraling motion, surrounding it in a vortex of wind . Charged attacks have the power to blow away enemies and can fire the tornado forwards.

title: Siluria's Tree
text: Received upon defeating Crucible Knight Siluria at the Deeproot Depths . She guards a giant hollow tree trunk to the southwest of the Nameless Eternal City .

title: Spear of the Impaler
text: Weapon of Messmer the Impaler . A greatspear with a warped blade in the shape of undulating flame . Remade by the forging arts of the realm of shadow , this weapon can be thrown by executing a strong attack, dashing strong attack, or mounted strong attack. Charge the attack to produce flame on impact. Unique Skill : Messmer's Assault A fierce succession of attacks using a flame-coated spear tip. Repeated inputs allow up to two follow-up attacks. The final move thrusts the spear into the ground, causing countless spears to form in the surrounding area.

title: Spear of the Impaler
text: Can be obtained after trading Remembrance of the Impaler with Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold .

title: Axe of Godrick
text: Greataxe wielded by Godrick the Grafted . This golden battleaxe is emblazoned with the figure of a beast , representing the strength of Godfrey , First Elden Lord and patriarch of the golden lineage . "I command thee kneel! For I am the lord of all that is golden!" Unique Skill : I Command Thee, Kneel! Repeatedly smash the Axe of Godrick into the ground, unleashing two earth-shaking shockwaves. Follow up with an additional input to produce a third shockwave.

title: Axe of Godrick
text: The Axe of Godrick is one of the options that can be obtained by turning in the Remembrance of the Grafted to Finger Reader Enia . The Remembrance can be duplicated at Wandering Mausoleums which possess a bell in order to obtain both options.

Three golden amber jewels are inlaid on the butt and each blade features a red gemstone.

title: Bonny Butchering Knife
text: Weapon of the greater potentates of Bonny Village . An outsize butcher's cleaver used to dismember human bodies in the making of the great jars stored in the gaols . Restores a very small amount of HP when it squarely strikes an enemy. Unique Skill : Hone Blade Perform a stroking action to sharpen blade, honing its cutting edge and increasing amount of HP recovered. The greater potentates treasure the tools of their practice.

title: Bonny Butchering Knife
text: The weapon can be found at Bonny Village below a small shed outside a house, near the broken bridge.

title: Bonny Butchering Knife
text: The Bonny Butchering Knife is identical in both appearance and moveset to the one wielded by Anastasia, Tarnished-Eater , and it has the same ability of restoring a very small amount of HP after a landed attack. However, its unique skill does set it apart slightly from the other weapon.

The knight, once the personal guard of Godwyn , was also the protector of the Prince of Death 's cadaver surrogate . Unique Skill : Blinkbolt: Long-hafted Axe From a low stance, the body is transformed into a bolt of lightning and charges straight ahead at fulgurous speed. Strong attack performs a lightning-charged leaping slash.

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: Greatsword forged from a blue-white meteoric ore . The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic . A weapon unique to the Alabaster Lords , a race of ancients with skin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteor struck long ago. Unique Skill : Alabaster Lord's Pull Thrust the armament into the ground to create a gravity well. In addition to dealing damage, this attack pulls enemies in. Has a greater area of effect than Gravitas .

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: Deals an extra 20% damage against Gravity -type enemies.

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: Location : Lake of Rot Defeat the Alabaster Lord in the Lake of Rot (will not drop if the Lord is killed at the same time as the player) to obtain the Alabaster Lord's Sword. He is on top of a large Ancient Dynasty structure. Random Drop : Defeat Alabaster Lords in Yelough Anix Tunnel .

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: The Alabaster Lord's Sword is upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . The Alabaster Lord's Sword cannot have its affinities changed with Ashes of War or Whetblades .

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: Unlike Ash of War: Gravitas , which deals entirely Magic damage, this weapon's skill mostly Physical damage with some Magic damage, with roughly the same damage ratio as the weapon itself. The shortest among all greatswords. The 2-handed charged heavy attacks of this weapon deals damage on par with that of a Colossal Sword while draining much less Stamina than any other greatsword's. 1-handed charge attacks have similar bonuses but much less of a damage increase. To be precise, the 1-handed charged heavy attacks have a roughly 10% higher damage multiplier while the 2-handed charged heavy attack has a 34% damage multiplier, and both cost only 18 points of Stamina where the average stamina cost for greatswords for both is between 35 and 42 points of Stamina for the 1-handed ones and between 38 and 48 for 2-handed ones.

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: Despite that being its highest Attribute requirement, its Intelligence scaling is rather subpar.

title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
text: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword Onyx Lord's Greatsword

title: Blasphemous Blade
text: Sacred sword of Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy . Remains of the countless heroes he has devoured writhe upon the surface of this blade. Now they share the same blood , bound together as family. Some HP is restored upon defeating an enemy. Unique Skill : Taker's Flames Raise the sacred sword aloft to set it ablaze with blasphemous flames, then bring it down to fire off a forward blast. The flames steal HP from those they touch.

title: Blasphemous Blade
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Blasphemous , dropped by Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums with a bell to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Claymore
text: Location : Castle Morne The Claymore is found at Castle Morne in a room attached to the central courtyard, tucked behind the burning pile of bodies. After ascending the elevator, march forward to the top of the hill, circle it clockwise, and continue onward past the palisades and through the doorway lit by a wall torch. The item is stored within a treasure chest behind several wooden barricades in a corner to the left. The misbegotten may follow the player into this room, depending on their route.

title: Claymore

title: Dark Moon Greatsword
text: A Moon Greatsword bestowed by a Carian queen upon her spouse to honor long-standing tradition. One of the legendary armaments . Ranni 's sigil is a full moon , cold and leaden, and this sword is but a beam of its light . Unique Skill : Moonlight Greatsword Raise the sword aloft, bathing it in the light of the dark moon . Temporarily increases magic attack power and imbues blade with frost . Charged attack release blasts of moonlight.

title: Dark Moon Greatsword
text: The Dark Moon Greatsword is Elden Ring ’s version of the Moonlight Greatsword, which has appeared in multiple other FromSoftware games. Additionally, the name of the sword’s Unique Skill also alludes to this. The Chinese and Korean version 1.00 release of the game preserve a very different earlier draft of this item description, roughly translating to " A greatsword of guidance bestowed on Ranni the Witch by the Two Fingers. The very Rune of Mind that will lead the next generation. " [ 1 ] The role of Carian matrimonial sword was instead filled by the Sword of Night and Flame .

text: A beaten red battle standard is furled around this time-worn halberd. Even after his lord was fled, Commander O'Neil continued to brandish this flag in the devastation of the rot -eaten field of battle, the sole veteran who remembers this battle with pride. Unique Skill : Rallying Standard Hoist the war banner aloft and give a rallying command. Raises attack power and defense for self and nearby allies.

title: Dragon Halberd
text: Dropped by the Dragonkin Soldier in the lower Siofra River region. It is reached either by going through a Sending Gate found on top of a crumbled pillar on the eastern side of lower Siofra, just south of the Worshippers' Woods grace. Alternatively, it may be reached by going all the way across the bridge from the Mimic Tear grace in Nokron, Eternal City and carefully dropping down the ledges on the building.

title: Flowerstone Gavel
text: Weapon of the Dragon Communion priestess . A dragonstone hammer resembling an ancient flower . The four petals and the flower's core are all sharp, ending in points, and are capable of dealing heavy damage to dragons . Unique Skill : Flower Dragonbolt Calls down the red lightning of the ancient dragons to strike a target. Deals lightning damage and also temporarily reduces the target's lightning damage negation . Can be charged to increase its power.

title: Marika's Hammer

The hammer partially broke upon shattering the Ring, becoming splintered with rune fragments. Unique Skill : Gold Breaker Leap up high and, while suspended in midair, imbue the rune shard with light before smashing it down hard onto the ground. The heroic Radagon's signature attack.

This kick -based martial art is unique to Dane , a Dryleaf and sworn ally of Leda . He acquired these skills by training with the aid of a waterfall; letting the water beat his body, and throwing himself into its basin.

text: Bloody Helice is a melee armament found in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 See Also

title: Bloody Helice
text: Ominous piercing sword with a winding blade. Carried by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood . Designed to bore into flesh, causing severe blood loss at the wound. The extracted blood trickles gracefully down the length of the blade. Unique Skill: Dynast's Finesse Nimbly avoid an attack, securing some distance from foes. Follow up with a strong attack to perform a sudden lunge, and press strong attack again to perform a sweeping slice.

title: Bloody Helice
text: Writheblood Ruins , north of the Second Church of Marika in the Altus Plateau . It will be in a chest behind the Sanguine Noble miniboss.

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: Dragon King's Cragblade is a melee armament found in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 Upgrading 6 See Also

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: Piercing Gravel Stone sword containing primeval lightning . A portion of the Dragonlord 's power, gained from a remembrance . This weapon commands great power over the paltry, mortal dragons of today. Unique Skill : Thundercloud Form Temporarily transform into a red thundercloud and fly through the air, then plunge down with a lightning-infused blade. Hold to increase the reach of the thundercloud form.

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Dragonlord , gained by defeating Dragonlord Placidusax , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: This weapon's Guard Counters become Thrusting Counterattacks . Has a 30% damage boost against Dragons and a 15% damage boost against Ancient Dragons . Since this weapon primarily deals Pierce -type damage, which is most dragons weakness, it is well suited to this anti-dragon role. Be aware that Borealis, the Freezing Fog, is a Pierce-resistant dragon and that all Ancient Dragons resist the secondary Lightning damage. The Dexterity -scaling is responsible for increasing both the Physical damage and the Lightning damage. The Physical/Lightning split is roughly 60%/40%. Scales best with Dexterity, up to the 80 point softcap. The skill is chargeable, benefiting from the Godfrey Icon . Has a unique heavy attack, shared with the Bloody Helice .

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: In comparison with the default one, found on the Godskin Stitcher , the regular heavy attack has longer reach, the charge heavy attack is a lunging thrust instead of a short-ranged double thrust, and the feint (done by dodging when charging a heavy attack).

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: Patch 1.04 decreased the skill's cost from 35 FP to 28 FP, decreased its recovery time, and decreased the damage of the uncharged version of the skill. Also increased skill cast speed. Patch 1.07 increased the directional control of the skill. Patch 1.08 reduced the speed of crouching light attacks and the stagger of two-handed jumping heavy attacks, and also the poise damage of all attacks in PvP.

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: This weapon is upgraded with Somber Smithing Stones . This weapon can't be infused with Ashes of War or buffed.

title: Dragon King's Cragblade
text: Bolt of Gransax , another weapon associated with an Ancient Dragon Dragon Greatclaw and Dragonclaw Shield , two more generic Ancient Dragon weapons

title: Sword Lance
text: Weapon once wielded by Commander Gaius . A combination of greatsword and lance . Weighty and capable of being brought to bear with great force, this armament shows its true potential when used astride a mount . Gaius himself was never without his boar . Skill : Spinning Gravity Thrust A gravity skill honed by the disciples of an Alabaster Lord . Uses gravitational power to hang in the air before rotating the body and charging forward. An additional input allows for a follow-up attack.

title: Dragonscale Blade
text: A weapon made by sharpening a Gravel Stone scale, thought to be the source of ancient dragon immortality, into an unclouded blade. Alas, the Dragonkin Soldiers never attained immortality, and perished as decrepit, pale imitations of their skyborn kin. Unique Skill : Ice Lightning Sword Call down a bolt of ice lightning into the blade and bring it down upon a foe. The ice lightning effect will persist for a while.

title: Hand of Malenia
text: Blade built into Malenia 's prosthetic arm. Through consecration it is resistant to rot . Malenia's war prosthesis symbolized her victories. Some claim to have seen wings when the weapon was raised aloft; wings of fierce determination that have never known defeat. Unique Skill : Waterfowl Dance Perform a series of one-footed leaps in the manner of a waterfowl to unleash a swift yet graceful slashing combo. Repeated inputs allow for up to two follow-up attacks.

title: Hand of Malenia
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Rot Goddess , gained by defeating Malenia, Blade of Miquella , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums with a bell to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Meteoric Ore Blade
text: Katana forged from meteoric ore to dispatch lifeforms born of falling stars . Deals magic damage . The blade is weighty , known to deliver slashes of such ferocity that the impact is said to resemble the crash of a falling meteor .

title: Meteoric Ore Blade
text: Causes blood loss buildup (50) Has a 20% damage bonus against Gravity -affinity enemies.

title: Meteoric Ore Blade
text: Found in the underground chambers in the northwest section of the Caelid Waypoint Ruins . It is inside of a chest behind a door in the far corner of the room.

title: Meteoric Ore Blade
text: The Strength -scaling is slightly stronger than the Intelligence -scaling and works of the greater Physical base damage. However, the Intelligence-scaling helps the skill more and a Str/Int hybrid build deals damage that is almost equivalent to a pure Str one. Has unique regular and charged Heavy attacks that consist of a straight-down slash (see trivia for past-games connection). This weapon cannot be buffed or have its affinity changed with Ashes of War .

title: Meteoric Ore Blade

title: Meteoric Ore Blade

Patch 1.08 reduced the poise damage for Katanas in PvP. Patch 1.09 changed this weapon's scaling values.

Follow up with either a normal or a strong attack to draw the blade at great speed for an instant slash attack . Both attacks fire off a wave of light.

title: Rivers of Blood
text: Weapon of Okina , swordsman from the Land of Reeds . A cursed weapon that has felled countless men. When Mohg, the Lord of Blood , first felt Okina's sword, and madness, upon his flesh, he had a proposal, to offer Okina the life of a demon, whose thirst would never go unsated. Unique Skill : Corpse Piler Forms a blade of cursed blood for repeated, interweaving successive attacks. Follow up with an additional input for further successive attacks.

title: Rivers of Blood
text: Defeat Okina at the Church of Repose .

title: Rivers of Blood
text: The weapon's Japanese name, Shizanketsuga (屍山血河), is a four-character idiom referring to mounds of corpses and "rivers" of blood left in the aftermath of a battle. [ 1 ] Similarly, Rivers of Blood's Unique Skill is called Shishiruirui (死屍累々) in Japanese, another idiom that also refers to heaps of corpses left on a battlefield. [ 2 ]

title: Star-Lined Sword
text: Sword encrusted with a line of stars fashioned from small pieces of crude glintstone . Weapon of the demi-human swordsmen . When bestowed with this weapon by their queen , the swordsmen swear to find the truth that lies at the end of the procession of stars . Unique Skill : Onze's Line of Stars This skill , named after a demi-human swordmaster , imbues sorcerous energy into lined glintstones and executes a slash attack. Repeated inputs allow for up to two follow-up attacks, each dealing greater damage than the last.

title: Leda's Sword
text: Light greatsword with gold inlaid. Weapon of Leda, the Needle Knight . Deals holy damage . Though polished to a mirror sheen, this blade still reeks with he stench of crusted blood that lingers from the cull of her knightly comrades . Unique Skill : Needle Piercer Skill of Needle Knight Leda. Generates ten golden needles which pierce their target all at once. Those pierced are purged of all ailments and special effects alike.

title: Leda's Sword

title: Milady
text: A light greatsword ; that is, a sword whose blade matches the length of a greatsword, while being constrained to a minimal weight. Nicknamed after ladies of noble status for its refined appearance. With cultivated form, one can wield this weapon as swiftly as one might a straightsword .

title: Milady

title: Rellana's Twin Blades
text: Carian light greatsword embedded with blue glintstone . Weapon of Rellana, the Twin Moon Knight . Two swords as a single armament. When two-handing , a straight sword engraved with golden flame will be carried in the left hand. Here , and here alone, were moon and fire ever together. Unique Skill : Moon-and-Fire Stance Assume ready stance, swords imbued with magic . Follow up with normal attack to cast glintstone light waves , or strong attack to perform a spinning attack that bathes the area with flame. Light waves can have up to two follow-up casts with additional inputs.

title: Obsidian Lamina
text: Signature weapon of the Pureblood Knight Ansbach . A viciously keen and slender scythe made for combat. The obsidian edge relies not upon trickery to fulfil its violent purpose – through skill alone the wielder can rip and rend through foes, sowing blossoms of red upon the battlefield. Unique Skill : Dynastic Sickleplay A finessed evasive skill that creates space to maneuver. Inputs dictate direction of the backstep. Follow up with strong attack to perform an advancing upward slash. Press strong attack again to bring the weapon back down.

title: Obsidian Lamina

title: Winged Scythe
text: Sacred scythe resembling a pair of white wings. Deals holy damage . According to pagan belief, white-winged maidens are said to be Death 's gentle envoys. Unique Skill : Angel's Wings Jump and imbue the wing-blade of the armament with light , then deliver a slashing attack on the enemy. The white wings impede recovery actions using a flask of tears .

title: Winged Scythe
text: Angel's Wings Jump and imbue the wing-blade of the armament with light, then deliver a slashing attack on the enemy. The white wings impede recovery actions using a Flask of Crimson Tears . The skill only disables using the Flask of Crimson Tears of other players and player-style NPC invaders. Non-player-style enemies , such as Haligtree Knights and Depraved Perfumers , can still heal using their flasks.

title: Winged Scythe
text: Location : Tombsward Ruins The Winged Scythe is found in a treasure chest in the underground cellar at the Tombsward Ruins , located on the western Weeping Peninsula .

title: Winged Scythe
text: The Winged Scythe can be strengthened to +10 with Somber Smithing Stones . It scales best with Dexterity and Faith , with the latter having stronger scaling. However, it gains 3% more AR on a split Dexterity/Faith build, if somewhat more split between damage types. The Battle Art generates sacred White light and soft white feathers. An uneven pair of white-feathered wings affixed to an octagonal pole, the Winged Scythe features carved reliefs of bearded elders, possibly depicting the Bearded Ancient Dynasty Statues . Robed, bald-headed men, seen elsewhere on Ancient Dynasty stelae and obelisks, stand side-by-side to form a band just below the wing-like blades. Positioned above them is a different bearded figure, his features obscured beneath his dark, shadowy hood, similar to the certain skeleton statues found in catacombs .

title: Winged Scythe
text: The skill produces unique white feather visual effects. This weapon is superficially similar to the shape of the Ancestral Followers ' Greathorn Hammers , horns carved with tree ring-like markings.

text: The Bolt of Gransax is a Spear , a melee armament in Elden Ring . It is one of the Legendary Armaments .

title: Bolt of Gransax
text: Spear whittled from the weapon wielded by Gransax . One of the legendary armaments . A great ancient dragon , Gransax once rained calamity upon the Royal Capital - the only time in historical record that Leyndell's walls have fallen. This marked the dawn of the war against the ancient dragons . Unique Skill : Ancient Lightning Spear Imbue the armament with the ancient dragons' red lightning , then throw it as a spear. Can be charged to increase its power .

title: Bolt of Gransax
text: Located in Leyndell, Royal Capital . Exit the Erdtree Sanctuary and descend with the elevator, then jump over the street railing and down onto the building below. The spear is on top of its gigantic version. Warning : This item is not present in Leyndell, Ashen Capital . It must be obtained prior to defeating Maliketh, the Black Blade .
