title: Commander Gaius
text: Gaius and Radahn were good rivals in their youth, and this sorcery is a product of their friendly competition. - Blades of Stone Commander Gaius is an optional boss in Shadow of the Erdtree encountered outside the backdoor of the Shadow Keep . Contents 1 Background 2 Appearance 3 Boss Fight 4 Notes 5 Gallery 6 References

title: Commander Gaius
text: Commander Gaius was a noted warrior and military strategist who rode a giant boar as his steed. Gaius studied gravitational magic from an Alabaster Lord . [ 1 ] He was a fellow student of Radahn , a future demigod . He also befriended Messmer the Impaler , as both had in common that they were cursed from birth. The pair were as elder brothers to Radahn, with whom Gaius had formed a friendly rivalry. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] When Messmer embarked on the purge of the Land of Shadow on Queen Marika the Eternal 's orders, Gaius would join him and serve as the commander of his soldiers. He was never without his boar. [ 4 ] Even when Marika abandoned Messmer, Gaius remained steadfast, guarding the backdoor of Shadow Keep . It was here that he would meet his end at the hands of a Tarnished champion .

title: Commander Gaius
text: Commander Gaius is an albinauric without legs who rides a heavily armored, great-tusked boar. Gaius wears black iron armor patterned to represent fallen seeds and wields the Sword Lance . [ 1 ] He was cursed by his Albinauric heritage and as such was doomed to lose the use of his legs. [ 5 ]

title: Commander Gaius
text: Commander Gaius will charge with his boar to try to run you over. This can be dodge by jumping over with torrent or dodging at a very exact moment. He also uses gravity magic to attack enemies that are too far away.

title: Commander Gaius
text: Wears Gaius's Helm , Gaius's Armor , Gaius's Gauntlets , and Gaius's Greaves Wields Sword Lance Casts Blades of Stone Gaius serves as a foil to Royal Knight Loretta , who hid her Albinauric nature from her compatriots.

title: Commander Niall
text: Commander Niall is an optional boss in Elden Ring . Defeating him will unlock the Commander Niall achievement . Contents 1 Overview 2 Moveset 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 Gallery 6 See Also 7 References

title: Commander Niall
text: Commander Niall, a veteran general of Castle Sol , offered his prosthesis in exchange for the lives of imprisoned knights , forming an army of no nation. [ 1 ] A lone survivor, Niall commands the spirits of deceased knights to defend his master, who has long passed. [ 2 ] Niall guards a chest containing the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left) , one-half of the Medallion required to gain access to the Consecrated Snowfield , the land of Miquella's Haligtree .

title: Commander Niall
text: At the beginning of the fight, Niall summons the spirits of two Banished Knights , one with a sword and shield, and the other wielding dual swords. Niall will be relatively passive while the knights are alive, instead buffing them until they have both been defeated or his health has been reduced to half. Both Banished Knights will inflict Frostbite with their attacks. Niall himself uses a mixture of lightning and frost -based attacks. He can imbue his prosthesis with lightning and perform kicks and stomps, and he can use his halberd to generate frost.

title: Commander Niall
text: Internal name: OldGeneral (ID: 3050) The Japanese description for Veteran's Prosthesis states Niall offered his leg, rather than his prosthetic, in exchange for his knights.

title: Commander O'Neil
text: Commander O'Neil is a boss in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Overview 2 Moveset 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 Gallery 6 See Also 7 References

title: Commander O'Neil
text: A veteran of a battle that took place in the Swamp of Aeonia in Caelid . He continued to brandish his flag in the rot-eaten battlefield even after his lord fled. [ 1 ] He wears the same armor and wields the same standard as Commander Niall , the leader of an army of no nation situated in Castle Sol . In battle, Commander O'Neil summons the spirits of Exile Soldiers . Initially, he will summon five regular soldiers, and will summon three large soldiers after his health has been reduced to half. His attacks inflict Scarlet Rot . O'Neil is in possession of the Unalloyed Gold Needle, which is required by Sage Gowry to stanch Millicent 's Rot. Polyanna, Adopted Daughter can be summoned for this fight.

title: Talismans
text: Talismans are special items in Elden Ring . They can be equipped to provide a variety of effects. Note that talismans with variants (like +1 or +2 after the name) will only allow one of these to be equipped at a time, so one can't equip both Arsenal Charm and Arsenal Charm +1 , even if one has enough talisman slots for both. You begin the game with the ability to equip 1 talisman at a time. This number can be increased by acquiring Talisman Pouches .

title: Aged One's Exultation
text: A talisman depicting the exultation of the aging untouchable , whose head resembles a sprig of ripe grapes . Raises attack power when madness is triggered in the vicinity. "Gift your madness to our Lord . Bless our brethren with grapes. Take care that they fully ripen."

title: Aged One's Exultation
text: Aged One's Exultation is dropped by the Aging Untouchable found nearest to the Abandoned Church in the Abyssal Woods . The Aging Untouchable is only vulnerable after it has been parried. [ 1 ]

title: Aged One's Exultation
text: Aged One's Exultation increases attack power by +20% for 30 seconds when madness is triggered near the player. This buff may be stacked with Black Dumpling and Madding Hand for a total of +41.9% attack power. This buff is reduced to +12% in PvP. It is highly effective against enemies that induce Madness . Pairs well with builds utilizing frenzy-inducing abilities or spells . The buff persists after removing the talisman.

title: Aged One's Exultation
text: Clarifying Horn Charm +2 Frenzied Flame Seal Kindred of Rot's Exultation Lord of Blood's Exultation Shabriri's Woe

title: Ailment Talisman
text: Ailment Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Grants resistance to triggered ailments; Weight: 0.6; Sell Price: 500

title: Ailment Talisman
text: Ailment Talisman is a talisman in Shadow of the Erdtree . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 Trivia 5 See also

title: Ailment Talisman
text: A talisman depicting a soul taken by sickness. When certain ailments are triggered, this talisman grants resistance to the same ailment. When the weak were infected with the dreaded fly sickness , they perished well before the metamorphosis could take hold. Oddly, those who cared for the infected and made certain they were given a proper burial were never afflicted themselves.

title: Ailment Talisman
text: Ailment Talisman is found in the Gravesite Plain at the Abandoned Ailing Village . It is located on a corpse at the edge of an unfinished wooden bridge.

title: Ailment Talisman
text: Ailment Talisman provides ~+350 resistance to a specific status effect after being afflicted. Poison / Scarlet Rot resistance lasts for 120 seconds. Frostbite resistance lasts for 45 seconds. Hemorrhage , Sleep , and Madness resistance last for 30 seconds. Death Blight is not affected, as its onset kills the player. The buildup or duration of the triggering ailment is immediately reduced by a certain amount. This talisman is especially useful in areas or encounters where specific ailments are prevalent.

title: Ailment Talisman
text: Prior to Update 1.13 , the buildup of a status effect was not reduced when the Ailment Talisman was triggered.

title: Ailment Talisman
text: Immunizing Horn Charm +2 Mottled Necklace +2 Clarifying Horn Charm +2

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: Ancestral Spirit's Horn — Type: Talisman; Description: Restores FP upon defeating enemies; Weight: 1.2; Sell Price: 500

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: Ancestral Spirit's Horn is a talisman in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 See also

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: Item cut from the horns of the Regal Ancestor Spirit . Restore FP upon defeating enemies . A number of new growths bud from the antler-like horns of the fallen king , each glowing with light . Thus does new life grow from death, and from death , one obtains power.

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor , gained by defeating Regal Ancestor Spirit , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: Gain 3 FP when an enemy dies.

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: The FP gain effect is signified by small blue swirls entering the character's body. Stacks with the similar effects from the Sacrificial Axe and Sword of Milos , for a possible 12 FP gain per death. The enemy doesn't have to be killed by the wearer of this Talisman for the effect to take place, nor do the killed enemies have to be hostile to the wearer. This makes it useful for Invaders that want to hang back and recuperate after an unsuccessful attempt, or when harassing the Host and Fingers/Summons with ranged attacks, Spells , or Skills . Fairly useful in the open world and dungeons for the FP regain effect lowering the need to use the Flask of Cerulean Tears to replenish it, but usually useless in boss fights as the vast majority of them do not have easily killable minions to activate it.

title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
text: Sacrificial Axe , which also has a passive " FP gain on enemy deaths" effect Sword of Milos , which also has a passive " FP gain on enemy deaths" effect

title: Arrow's Reach Talisman
text: Arrow's Reach Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Increases bow effective range; Weight: 0.7; Sell Price: 500

title: Arrow's Reach Talisman
text: Arrow's Reach Talisman is a talisman in Elden Ring .

title: Arrow's Reach Talisman
text: A talisman depicting three arrows. Carried by hunters of beasts. Increases the effective range of bows.

title: Arrow's Reach Talisman
text: Found in a chest along the bridge over Stormgate 's entrance. To access it, go to the southwest tower, kill the guards here, and then you can enter the area.

title: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman
text: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts; Weight: 1.1

title: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman
text: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree .

title: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman
text: A talisman composed of fletched and iron arrows. Increases the effective range of bows and raises attack power of arrows and bolts.

title: Arrow's Soaring Sting Talisman
text: Can be found on the top of a tower at Fog Rift Fort . From within the door of the tower where Black Knight Garrew was, go through a gap between the tower and the rock wall to the east of the doorway. Hop down onto the wooden pathway and follow it until you see a ladder on your right. Take it up, after which you'll see another ladder on your left. Take it to the uppermost level of the tower. Here you can find the treasure chest containing the Talisman.

title: Arrow's Sting Talisman
text: Arrow's Sting Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises attack power of arrows and bolts; Weight: 0.7; Sell Price: 500

title: Arrow's Sting Talisman
text: Arrow's Sting Talisman is a talisman in Elden Ring . Provides a 10% damage boost to arrows and bolts.

title: Arrow's Sting Talisman
text: A talisman depicting three iron arrows. Carried by soldiers long ago. Raises attack power of arrows and bolts.

title: Arrow's Sting Talisman
text: Obtained from a chest, atop the wooden siege tower, next to Impassable Greatbridge , in Caelid , near Redmane Castle .

title: Arsenal Charm
text: Arsenal Charm — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises maximum equipment load; Weight: 1.5; Obtained: Quest: Nepheli Loux, Warrior; Sell Price: 100

title: Arsenal Charm
text: The Arsenal Charm is a Talisman in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 See Also

title: Arsenal Charm
text: An iron charm that resembles a mass of weapons. Boosts maximum equipment load. This talisman was derived from an unusual greatsword once wielded by a hero hungry for vengeance.

title: Arsenal Charm
text: Quest Item: Roundtable Hold Received from Nepheli Loux in Roundtable Hold, after talking to her at Stormveil Castle and defeating Godrick the Grafted .

title: Arsenal Charm
text: Increases Equip Load by 15%.

title: Arsenal Charm
text: Arsenal Charm +1 Great-Jar's Arsenal Winged Crystal Tear

title: Arsenal Charm +1
text: Arsenal Charm +1 — Type: Talisman; Description: Greatly raises maximum equipment load; Weight: 1.5; Sell Price: 100

title: Arsenal Charm +1
text: The Arsenal Charm +1 is a talisman in Elden Ring . It gives +17% Equip Load. This talisman has 3 variants, including Great-Jar's Arsenal , only one of which can be equipped at a time.

title: Arsenal Charm +1
text: An iron charm that resembles a mass of weaponry. Greatly boosts maximum equipment load. This talisman was derived from an unusual greatsword once wielded by a hero hungry for vengeance.

title: Arsenal Charm +1
text: Found in Altus Tunnel , looted from a corpse upon a wooden balcony overlooking a pit, where a monster fires rocks at you from above, with gravity magic. From the entrance to this area, drop to an overgrown root, and climb it to jump to an upper balcony, where the corpse lies.

title: Arsenal Charm +1
text: Arsenal Charm Great-Jar's Arsenal

title: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger
text: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger — Type: Talisman; Description: Critical hits restore FP; Weight: 0.8; Sell Price: 1500

title: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger
text: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger is a talisman in Elden Ring . Restores 15 FP when a critical hit is performed.

title: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger
text: An assassin 's dagger, misshapen and stained in cerulean. Critical hits restore FP . This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives . Those which gave the demigods their first taste of Death .

title: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger
text: Obtained from defeating the Black Knife Assassin in Black Knife Catacombs in northeast Liurnia of the Lakes

title: Assassin's Crimson Dagger
text: Assassin's Crimson Dagger — Type: Talisman; Description: Critical hits restore HP; Weight: 0.6; Sell Price: 1500

title: Assassin's Crimson Dagger
text: Assassin's Crimson Dagger is a talisman in Elden Ring . Provides healing of 85HP + 10% of Maximum HP, when a critical hit is performed.

title: Assassin's Crimson Dagger
text: An assassin 's dagger, misshapen and stained in crimson. Critical hits restore HP . This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives . Those which gave the demigods their first taste of Death .

title: Assassin's Crimson Dagger
text: Obtained by defeating the Black Knife Assassin in Deathtouched Catacombs , in northern Limgrave

title: Axe Talisman
text: Axe Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Enhances charge attacks; Weight: 0.8; Sell Price: 500

title: Axe Talisman
text: Axe Talisman is a talisman in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Axe Talisman
text: A talisman depicting an axe and a warrior . Enhances charge attacks. The Lord who led the Long March bore an axe , and his loyal warriors honored him by wielding axes of their own, making them very effective at dealing decisive blows.

title: Axe Talisman
text: Obtained from a chest in the cellar of Mistwood Ruins , eastern Limgrave . A Runebear lies very close to the entrance.

title: Axe Talisman
text: Increases the damage of charged heavy melee attacks by 10%.

title: Axe Talisman
text: Doesn't enhance the Dark Moon Greatsword's charged heavy attacks when they're buffed by its Unique Skill: Moonlight Greatsword . Doesn't work with the projectiles launched by the charged heavy attacks of the Frozen Needle or Wing of Astel . Has strong synergy with the Roar Medallion if using a skill that boosts heavy attacks. Skill compatible with both are Barbaric Roar , Braggart's Roar , Shriek of Milos , and War Cry . Synergy with the Spear Talisman with weapons that have charged heavy attacks that deal Pierce damage. Weapon types that primarily have thrusting heavy attacks are Great Spears , Spears (except for the Death Ritual Spear , Partisan , and Spiked Spear ), Heavy Thrusting Swords (except for the Great Épée ), Thrusting Swords (except for the Estoc ), and Straight Swords (except for the Broadsword , Cane Sword , Carian Knight's Sword , and Lazuli Glintstone Sword ).

title: Axe Talisman
text: Other notable weapons are the Claymore , Lucerne , Nagakiba , Pickaxe , Rusted Anchor , Warpick , and the Zweihander and Troll's Golden Sword . Works well with the unique charged heavy attack of the Iron Cleaver and Celebrant's Cleaver , since while they are weaker than the usual Axe charged heavy attack they also include a run-up that potentially let's them be used from a safe distance to close in.

title: Axe Talisman
text: The icon depicts a Highlander wearing a Leather Crown and brandishing a Highland Axe .

title: Axe Talisman
text: Spiked Cracked Tear , a Crystal Tear that boosts charged heavy attacks by 15% for 3 minutes

title: Beloved Stardust
text: Beloved Stardust — Type: Talisman; Description: Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken; Weight: 1.3; Sell Price: 2000

title: Beloved Stardust
text: Beloved Stardust is a Talisman in Shadow of the Erdtree .

title: Beloved Stardust
text: A talisman depicting a wizened hand gently gripping a glintstone . Shortens casting speed for sorcery and incantations by the utmost, but increases damage taken. Count Ymir was known for his recitations. "One need only envision the romance of the stars above with adoration for stardust in one's heart to become a great sorcerer . Do so, and you will know love."

title: Beloved Stardust
text: Beloved Stardust can be obtained as a reward: Given by Count Ymir at the Cathedral of Manus Metyr after using the Hole-Laden Necklace to ring the first hanging bell at a Finger Ruins .

title: Blade of Mercy
text: Blade of Mercy — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises attack power after each critical hit; Weight: 1.3; Sell Price: 100

title: Blade of Mercy
text: Blade of Mercy is a talisman in Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree . While equipped, performing a critical hit will raise the player's attack power for a limited time. Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia

title: Blade of Mercy
text: A thin, blood-stained dagger. No longer fit for use. Raises attack power after each critical hit. Hornsent employed this to honorably end the suffering of a compatriot. After claiming numerous lives, the dagger is now broken, but has acquired a spectral aura.

title: Blade of Mercy
text: Acquired from a chest at the top of Scorched Ruins .

title: Blade of Mercy
text: Raises Attack Power by 20% for 20 seconds after the user performs a Critical Attack .

title: Blade of Mercy
text: Performing another Critical Attack when under this talisman's effect refreshes the duration.

title: Blade of Mercy
text: Shares a name with the Blade of Mercy weapon from Bloodborne .

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
text: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Slowly restores FP; Weight: 1.2

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
text: The Blessed Blue Dew Talisman is a Talisman in Shadow of the Erdtree . Contents 1 Description 2 Effects 3 Acquisition 4 Notes 5 See also

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
text: Talisman depicting the blessed boon that is a droplet of the blue, luminescent sap of the Erdtree . Gradually restores FP . It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever—but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith .

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
text: The Blessed Blue Dew Talisman gradually restores FP .

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
text: Location : Church of Benediction The Blessed Blue Dew Talisman can be obtained at the Church of Benediction .

title: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman
text: Blessed Dew Talisman Cerulean Seed Talisman Sacred Tear Talisman of Lord's Bestowal This page has missing data (FP). Please add it .

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: Blessed Dew Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Slowly restores HP; Weight: 0.6; Sell Price: 1000

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: The Blessed Dew Talisman is a Talisman in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Effects 3 Acquisition 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 Gallery 7 See also

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: Talisman depicting a drop of the Erdtree 's sap, a blessed boon. Gradually restores HP . It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever—but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith .

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: The Blessed Dew Talisman restores 2 HP per second.

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: Location : Leyndell, Royal Capital The Blessed Dew Talisman is obtained from a chest west of the Divine Bridge in Leyndell, Royal Capital. This area can be reached via an elevator in the courtyard outside the Fortified Manor , or by using the sending gate at the Tower of Return , in the Weeping Peninsula .

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: This talisman is more impactful at lower levels, so it is recommended to acquire it early via the Tower of Return.

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: The Blessed Dew Talisman had a slightly different description in version 1.00 , though it conveyed the same meaning. Talisman depicting a drop of the Erdtree's sap, a blessed boon. Gradually restores HP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever - but that age of plenty was short-lived, and the Erdtree became merely an object of faith.

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: Nameless cut key item resembles dew

title: Blessed Dew Talisman
text: Blessed Blue Dew Talisman Crimson Seed Talisman Sacred Tear Talisman of Lord's Bestowal

title: Blue Dancer Charm
text: Blue Dancer Charm — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises attack power with lower equipment load; Weight: 0.9; Sell Price: 500

title: Blue Dancer Charm
text: Blue Dancer Charm is a talisman in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 See Also

title: Blue Dancer Charm
text: A cloth doll depicting a dancer garbed in blue. An ancient heirloom of some sort. Raises attack power with lower equipment load . The dancer in blue represents a fairy , who in legend bestowed a flowing sword upon a blind swordsman . Blade in hand, the swordsman sealed away an ancient god - a god that was Rot itself.

title: Blue Dancer Charm
text: The Blue Dancer Charm is obtained by defeating the Guardian Golem in Highroad Cave in northern Limgrave .

title: Blue Dancer Charm
text: Applies a bonus to physical damage scaling, depending on current equipment load, with lower equipment loads providing a higher bonus. The bonus is based upon discrete equipment load thresholds of 8, 16, and 20, rather than being percentage-based. An equipment load of 30 or more provides no bonus.

title: Blue Dancer Charm
text: Blind Swordsman Blue Cloth Vest Flowing Curved Sword Verdigris Discus

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: Blue-Feathered Branchsword — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises defense when HP is low; Weight: 1.1; Obtained: Deathbird ( Stormhill ); Sell Price: 500

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: The Blue-Feathered Branchsword is a Talisman in Elden Ring . Contents 1 Description 2 Effect 3 Acquisition 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: A talisman adorned with blue feathers, once used in ancient death rituals . Raises defense when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death , and thus does one cling so tenaciously to life - to render up a death worth offering.

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: Provides an increase to damage negation , for all types of damage, when HP is below 20% .

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: Location : Stormhill The Blue-Feathered Branchsword is obtained by defeating the Deathbird that appears east of Warmaster's Shack in Stormhill . The Bird only appears at night, descending from the sky when the player approaches a ruin covered in Ruin Fragments and Sanctuary Stones that fell from Crumbling Farum Azula .

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: The Blue-Feathered Branchsword depicts a branched sword with seven blades, adorned with a black-and-blue feather. Smaller version of the Death Ritual Spear , also used by Servants of Death The blue color may represent the Twinbird , Death Rite Bird , and the Cerulean Coast .

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: Reference to the Seven-Branched Sword dating to the Yamato period .

title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
text: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger Primal Glintstone Blade Red-Feathered Branchsword Sacrificial Axe Twinbird Kite Shield

title: Boltdrake Talisman
text: Boltdrake Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Boosts lightning damage negation; Weight: 0.6; Sell Price: 100

title: Boltdrake Talisman
text: Boltdrake Talisman is a talisman in Elden Ring . It is part of the Boltdrake series of talismans, of which it cannot be stacked with. Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 See Also

title: Boltdrake Talisman
text: Talisman depicting a yellow ancient dragon. Boosts lightning damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.

title: Boltdrake Talisman
text: Loot: Stormveil Castle Obtained from a corpse just before the bridge leading eastward, to the Divine Tower of Limgrave .

title: Boltdrake Talisman
text: Increases Lightning Damage Negation by +13%.

title: Boltdrake Talisman +2
text: Loot: Crumbling Farum Azula Obtained from a corpse near the Dragon Temple Rooftop Site of Grace . From the Rooftop Grace proceed southeast to the arena of an Ancient Dragon . Proceed east to the edge of the arena, where you can drop to a series of platforms, leading to an isolated building. Proceed through the building, up a ladder, up an elevator, past a Crucible Knight , and up one more ladder, to find the corpse, hanging out of a window.

title: Boltdrake Talisman +3
text: Boltdrake Talisman +3 — Type: Talisman; Description: Reduces lightning damage; Weight: 0.9

title: Boltdrake Talisman +3
text: Boltdrake Talisman +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree . It reduces lightning damage taken by 22%.

title: Boltdrake Talisman +3
text: Talisman with a large depiction of a yellow ancient dragon . Boosts lightning damage negation by the utmost. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections.

title: Boltdrake Talisman +3
text: It can be found at Shadow Keep . From the Storehouse: First Floor site of grace , take the stairs up to the second floor and find a dead-end with several shade protectors. Jump over the railing to reach a room with the talisman, then use the lever to move the bookcase and re-emerge near the site of grace. Alternatively, From Storehouse, Back Section site of grace, immediately turn around and head east through the doorway, shortly after passing through the doorway, look to down to your left and there should be a large rectangular table that you can safely jump down to. The talisman should be right behind you on the floor next to that table.

title: Boltdrake Talismans
text: Boltdrake Talismans are a set of talismans in Elden Ring that increase Lightning damage negation. Only one of them can be equipped at the same time.

title: Boltdrake Talismans
text: Name: Boltdrake Talisman, Effect: Increases Lightning damage negation by 13% (4% in PvP)., Location: Stormveil Castle ( Limgrave ); Name: Boltdrake Talisman +1, Effect: Increases Lightning damage negation by 17% (5% in PvP)., Location: Old Altus Tunnel ( Altus Plateau ); Name: Boltdrake Talisman +2, Effect: Increases Lightning damage negation by 20% (6% in PvP)., Location: Crumbling Farum Azula; Name: Boltdrake Talisman +3, Effect: Increases Lightning damage negation by 22% (7% in PvP)., Location: Shadow Keep ( Scadu Altus )

title: Bull-Goat's Talisman
text: Bull-Goat's Talisman — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises Poise; Weight: 0.5; Sell Price: 1000

title: Bull-Goat's Talisman
text: Bull-Goat's Talisman is a talisman in Elden Ring . Increases poise by +33%.

title: Bull-Goat's Talisman
text: A talisman depicting the horns of a bull-goat . Raises poise . Bull-goats are associated with the stout and mighty Tragoth , said to be unflinching in combat - now a silent comrade to those who fight.

title: Bull-Goat's Talisman
text: Obtained from a corpse, in Dragonbarrow Cave , in northern Greyoll's Dragonbarrow , below the Minor Erdtree . Head left after entering the Runebear's room to find it.

title: Carian Filigreed Crest
text: Carian Filigreed Crest — Type: Talisman; Description: Lowers FP consumed by skills; Weight: 0.8; Sell Price: 1000

title: Carian Filigreed Crest
text: Carian Filigreed Crest is a talisman in Elden Ring . Reduces the FP cost of skills by 25%.

title: Carian Filigreed Crest
text: A talisman adorned with the royal crest. Lowers FP consumed by skills . An honor said to have once been awarded to Carian knights who served as direct retainers to the kingdom's princesses. Now there is only one princess: Ranni , daughter of Rennala .

title: Carian Filigreed Crest
text: Purchased from War Counselor Iji , in western Liurnia of the Lakes . Becomes available after killing Bloodhound Knight Darriwil in the Weeping Evergaol , for Blaidd .

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion
text: Cerulean Amber Medallion — Type: Talisman; Description: Raises maxiumum FP; Weight: 0.3; Sell Price: 100

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion
text: Cerulean Amber Medallion is a talisman in Elden Ring . It gives +7% Maximum FP. Note only one of these talisman variants can be equipped at a time.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion
text: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Boosts maximum FP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. A primordial life energy resides inside.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion
text: Obtained by defeating the Bloodhound Knight in Lakeside Crystal Cave in southern Liurnia of the Lakes

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion
text: Cerulean Amber Medallion +1 Cerulean Amber Medallion +2

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +1
text: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Greatly boosts maximum FP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. A primordial life energy resides inside.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +1
text: Obtained from a corpse hanging from a wooden platform attached to the southern wall of Castle Sol , in Mountaintops of the Giants . From Church of the Eclipse , head left to the front of the church, left through a door, right, up a ladder, southwest to a tower, which can be circled around, via a wooden platform, and down a ladder, to the wall in question. The corpse is guarded by a phantom knight, wielding dual swords.

text: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Vastly boosts maximum FP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. A primordial life energy resides inside.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +2
text: Obtained from a chest, in the cellar of Lunar Estate Ruins , in southern Liurnia of the Lakes . This area of Liurnia can only be accessed from underground, after progressing through Grand Cloister . The cellar is hidden beneath an illusory floor, and locked behind an imp statue that requires one Stonesword Key to open.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +2

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3
text: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3 is a Talisman in Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree . It raises maximum FP by 12.5%.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3
text: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Boosts maximum FP by the utmost. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord . These medallions, of the largest variety, were conferred to Godwyn's inner circle of distinguished golden knights.

title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +3
text: Obtained as a reward after defeating the Death Knight in Scorpion River Catacombs .

title: Sorceries
text: | For sorcerers, seek Glintstone Sorcerers . Sorceries (魔術, Majutsu ) are a medium of spells in Elden Ring . All sorceries require some FP to be cast and the majority of them require a heavy investment into the Intelligence stat, however, there are still some Faith and Arcane -based sorceries to be found. Sorceries can only be manifested through the use of Staves acting as a catalyst. The actual damage or effect per casting of a Sorcery is based on a unique stat of Staves called Sorcery Scaling , or SS. The value of this stat for any staff depends on the quality of the staff, its Strengthening level, and a combination of your relevant Stats and Attributes combined with the staff's Grade Ratio for those attributes (primarily focusing on Intelligence).

title: Sorceries
text: Individual spells will have their Power ratio represented as % SS (such as POWER: 75% SS), which represents the percentage of an equipped staff's Sorcery Scaling value that is used for each shot. Do note that enemy resistances will factor into how much damage you see an enemy take; the Power % shown for attack spells is based on calculations done on unarmored neutral critters in the starting zones. Contents 1 Schools of Sorceries 2 List of Sorceries 3 Notes 4 See also

title: Sorceries
text: Comet Azur , Founding Rain of Stars , Ranni's Dark Moon , and Stars of Ruin must be acquired to complete the Legendary Sorceries and Incantations achievement. Night Sorceries are sometimes referred to as Invisibility Sorceries. Loretta's Greatbow and Loretta's Mastery are not affected by either the Carian Glintblade Staff or the Carian Glintstone Staff . The Envoy Crown does not increase the effectiveness of Clayman bubble Sorceries.

title: Adula's Moonblade

title: Adula's Moonblade
text: Sorcery of Adula , the Glintstone Dragon . Conjures a cold magic greatsword, then delivers a sweeping blow that launches a blade-like projectile of frost . This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Adula, a devourer of sorcerers , was bested by Ranni and subsequently swore a knightly oath to her Dark Moon . Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 26 to 22.

title: Adula's Moonblade

title: Ambush Shard
text: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery . Launches a projectile from a distance removed from the caster, so as to strike the enemy from behind. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Sellian sorcerers were assassins, and it is said that they often hunted their fellows. Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 16 to 13.;

title: Ambush Shard
text: Loot: Weeping Peninsula Acquired from a corpse next to the imprisoned Sellen in the cellar of Witchbane Ruins .

title: Ancient Death Rancor
text: Ancient Death Rancor is a Sorcery spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Death Sorceries .

title: Ancient Death Rancor
text: Sorcery of the servants of Death . Summons a horde of vengeful spirits that chase down foes. Charging enhances potency. They are cinders of the ancient death hex , raked from the fires of ghostflame by Deathbirds . Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 24 to 21.

title: Ancient Death Rancor
text: Guaranteed Drop: Liurnia of the Lakes Acquired from defeating the Death Rite Bird that roams the sunken ruins south of the Gate Town North Site of Grace .

title: Blades of Stone
text: Blades of Stone is a spell in Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree .

title: Blades of Stone
text: Gravity-manipulating sorcery of Commander Gaius . Pulls blade-like clumps of rock from the earth. Charging increases potency. Gaius and Radahn were good rivals in their youth, and this sorcery is a product of their friendly competition.

title: Blades of Stone
text: Defeat Commander Gaius and trade his Remembrance with Finger Reader Enia .

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Briars of Punishment — Type: Sorcery ( Thorn Sorcery ); Description: Wounds caster to unleash a trail of bloodthorns; HP Cost: 10; FP Cost: 9; Stamina Cost: 22; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Mountaintops of the Giants; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 21

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Briars of Punishment is a sorcery spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the thorn sorceries . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 5 Strategies 6 Trivia 7 See also

title: Briars of Punishment
text: An aberrant sorcery discovered by exiled criminals . Theirs are the sorceries most reviled by the academy . Wounds the caster with thorns of punishment , sending a trail of bloodthorns running over the ground to impale enemies from below. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The guilty , their eyes gouged by thorns , lived in eternal darkness. There, they discovered the blood star .

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Loot: Mountaintops of the Giants Located by a dead tree on the western cliffs of the southern end of the giant stone bridge surrounded by Guilty enemies.

title: Briars of Punishment
text: The caster sacrifices their own blood to summon crawling vines of bloodthorn that pursue a single target. This spell deals Magic damage with an Attack Power equal to 212% of Sorcery Scaling , inflicting 72 Blood Loss and 7 Stance damage.

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Costs 50 HP and applies 25 Blood Loss per cast or recast. Costs 9 FP per cast or recast. Costs 22 Stamina per cast or recast. This spell has a long range and can scale walls and other obstacles. This spell will track and home in on its target. This spell utilizes the Briars of Sin .

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Alberich's Bracers , Alberich's Robe , Alberich's Pointed Hat , and Alberich's Pointed Hat (Altered) each boost the effectiveness by 6%, up to a maximum of 18%. Staff of the Guilty boosts the Attack Power by 20%. Magic Scorpion Charm increases Magic Attack Power by 12% (8% in PvP). Magic-Shrouding Cracked Tear increases Magic Attack Power by 20% (15% in PvP) for 3 minutes. Albinauric Staff and Maternal Staff provide a scaling bonus to Blood Loss buildup based on the caster's Arcane attribute. Azur's Glintstone Staff reduces the casting time of spells. Lord of Blood's Exultation boosts attack power by 20% (12% in PvP) for 20 seconds when Blood Loss occurs nearby.

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Briars of Punishment fires fewer projectiles than Impenetrable Thorns but is more reliable at long range against single targets.

title: Briars of Punishment
text: Requires Faith rather than Intelligence . Patch 1.07 reduced the FP cost from 13 to 9, increased the on-hit Blood Loss from 60 to 72, and reduced the casting time.

title: Briars of Sin (spell)
text: An aberrant sorcery discovered by exiled criminals . Theirs are the sorceries most reviled by the academy . Wounds the caster with thorns of sin , creating a spiral of bloodthorns . This sorcery can be cast repeatedly, up to three times. The guilty , their eyes gouged by thorns , lived in eternal darkness. There, they discovered the blood star .

title: Briars of Sin (spell)
text: Guaranteed Drop: Liurnia of the Lakes Obtained by defeating a lone Guilty located southwest of the Fire Monk Campsite , near the Church of Vows in Liurnia. This Sorcerer is near a group of Fire Slugs to the north of the Artist's Shack (Liurnia) .

title: Briars of Sin (spell)
text: The caster sacrifices their own blood to summon swirling vines of bloodthorn around themselves. This spell can be recast up to 2 additional times, with increasing intensity. It deals Magic damage with an Attack Power equal to 200/232/233% of Sorcery Scaling within a 2.5/3.5/4.5-meter radius, inflicting 95/95/95 Blood Loss and 7/7.5/8 Stance damage.

title: Briars of Sin (spell)
text: Costs 80 HP and applies 30 Blood Loss per cast or recast. Costs 6 FP per cast or recast. Costs 26 Stamina per cast or recast. This spell can be recast up to 3 times with additional inputs.

title: Briars of Sin (spell)
text: Alberich's Bracers , Alberich's Robe , Alberich's Pointed Hat , and Alberich's Pointed Hat (Altered) each boost the Attack Power by 6%, up to a maximum of 18%. Staff of the Guilty boosts the attack power by 20%. Magic Scorpion Charm increases Magic attack power by 12% (8% in PvP). Magic-Shrouding Cracked Tear increases Magic attack power by 20% (15% in PvP) for 3 minutes. Albinauric Staff and Maternal Staff provide a scaling bonus to Blood Loss buildup based on the caster's Arcane attribute. Azur's Glintstone Staff reduces the casting time of spells. Lord of Blood's Exultation boosts attack power by 20% (12% in PvP) for 20 seconds when Blood Loss occurs nearby.

title: Briars of Sin (spell)
text: This spell produces no sigil when cast. Used by Mad Tongue Alberich and the Guilty Sorcerers . Requires Faith rather than Intelligence . Update 1.07 reduced the FP cost from 9 to 6. The Briars of Sin had a different icon during the Closed Network Test for Elden Ring . It featured the spell sigil for Giants' Flame Incantations .

title: Cannon of Haima
text: Cannon of Haima — Type: Sorcery; Description: Lobs an explosive magic projectile in an arc; FP Cost: 38 (14); Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Converted Fringe Tower , north-east Liurnia of the Lakes; Int: 25; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Cannon of Haima
text: Cannon of Haima is a spell in Elden Ring . A powerful artillery-like blast with a shot trajectory similar to a Flame Sling , but creates a large high-damage explosion at the impact point. Devastating to clustered groups of enemies.

title: Cannon of Haima
text: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria . Lobs an explosive magic projectile that flies in an arc. Charging enhances potency. Drawn from the conspectus of Haima , the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs might as a means to quell conflict.

title: Cannon of Haima
text: Converted Fringe Tower , north-east Liurnia of the Lakes , not to be mistaken with the Converted Tower in the south-west. You will need to use the Erudition gesture given by Thops in front of the statue of Marika . This will reveal a hidden ladder to the top of the tower with a treasure chest that contains the spell. Unlike with the Converted Tower, here you will not only have to do the gesture, but also wear a glintstone crown headpiece while doing so. Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 45 to 38.

title: Carian Blade Sorceries
text: Carian Blade Sorceries is the sub-type of Carian Sorceries that has their damage boosted by 15% when wielding the Carian Glintblade Staff , and focused on creating floating blades and projectiles. Name: Carian Phalanx, Effect: Creates 9 Glintblades overhead and launches them at foes, FP cost: 24, Int. requirement: 34, Slots: 1, Location: Sold by Preceptor Seluvis; Name: Glintblade Phalanx, Effect: Creates 4 Glintblades overhead and launches them at foes, FP cost: 18, Int. requirement: 22, Slots: 1, Location: Sold from the Royal House Scroll; Name: Greatblade Phalanx, Effect: Creates 3 Great Glintblades overhead and launches them at foes, FP cost: 30, Int. requirement: 29, Slots: 1, Location: Dropped by Bols, Carian Knight; Name: Magic Downpour, Effect: Creates a cloud that fire magic projectiles, charging increases duration, FP cost: 18, Int.

title: Carian Greatsword
text: Carian Greatsword — Type: Sorcery; Description: Performs sweeping slash using magical greatsword; FP Cost: 12; Memory Slots: 1; Buy Price: 10000; Int: 24; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Carian Greatsword
text: Carian Greatsword is a spell in Elden Ring . Creates a massive magical greatsword twice as long as a Pike and swings it in a wide horizontal slash. Has a slight delay between the casting time and the time it is swung so it will need to be timed carefully to avoid getting hit first (cancelling it), but damage is decent, Stance damage is very good and it can hit enemies through walls.

title: Carian Greatsword
text: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family . Conjures a magic greatsword and then delivers a sweeping blow. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Armed with this spell, sorcerers gain the strength of knights, their loyalty sworn to the moon. Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 14 to 12.

title: Carian Greatsword
text: Purchase: Liurnia of the Lakes / Roundtable Hold Sold for 10,000 Runes by Miriel, Pastor of Vows . Should Miriel die before purchasing this Sorcery from him, then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them Miriel's Bell Bearing .

title: Carian Phalanx
text: Carian Phalanx — Type: Sorcery; Description: Forms a defensive arch of numerous magic glintblades; FP Cost: 24; Memory Slots: 1; Int: 34; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Carian Phalanx
text: Carian Phalanx is a spell in Elden Ring . A vastly improved version of Glintblade Phalanx with double the blades, that automatically fire at hostile enemies that get too close and they inflict good Stance damage. Cannot be used at the same time as Glintblade Phalanx, casting either spell replaces the effect of the previous one. It is one of the Carian Blade Sorceries , a subset of the Carian Sorceries .

title: Carian Phalanx
text: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family . Creates a defensive arch of numerous magic glintblades overhead, which automatically attack nearby foes. This sorcery can be used cast while in motion. An enhanced version of the glintblade sorcery used by enchanted knights . Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 26 to 24.

title: Carian Phalanx
text: Purchase: Liurnia of the Lakes / Roundtable Hold Sold for 12,000 Runes by Preceptor Seluvis . Should Seluvis die before purchasing this Sorcery from him, then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them Seluvis's Bell Bearing .

title: Carian Piercer
text: Carian Piercer — Type: Sorcery; Description: Conjures a magic sword to impale foes; FP Cost: 17; Memory Slots: 1; Int: 15; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Carian Piercer
text: Carian Piercer is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Carian Piercer
text: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family . Conjures a magic greatsword to impale foes. Charging lengthens the initial step in. This sorcery forms a counterpart to Carian Greatsword . Highly lethal when used against single foes riding alone. Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 19 to 17.

title: Carian Piercer
text: Guaranteed Drop: Liurnia of the Lakes Acquired from felling a Scarab in Caria Manor , located on the cliffs littered with Living Jars south of the Royal Moongazing Grounds Site of Grace .

title: Carian Piercer
text: In the Closed Network Test, this could only be found by starting out with the Enchanted Knight class.

title: Carian Retaliation
text: Carian Retaliation — Type: Sorcery; Description: Dispels enemy spells and retaliates with glintblades; FP Cost: 8; Memory Slots: 1; Buy Price: 9000; Int: 17; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Carian Retaliation
text: | This page is about the spell. For the Ash of War, seek Ash of War: Carian Retaliation . Carian Retaliation is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Carian Retaliation
text: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family . Swing your staff to dispel incoming sorceries and incantations, using their power to retaliate with glintblades. This was the Carian royal family's secret means to prepare against the disloyalty of the academy . The moon and stars would one day go their separate ways.

title: Carian Retaliation
text: Purchase: Liurnia of the Lakes / Roundtable Hold Sold for 9,000 Runes by Preceptor Seluvis . Should Seluvis die before purchasing this Sorcery from him, then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them Seluvis's Bell Bearing .

title: Carian Slicer
text: Carian Slicer — Type: Sorcery; Description: Performs swift sweeping slash using magical sword; FP Cost: 4; Memory Slots: 1; Cookbook: Royal House Scroll; Buy Price: 1,500; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 14; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Carian Slicer
text: Carian Slicer is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Carian Slicer
text: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family . Conjures a magic sword and delivers a swift sweeping slash. This sorcery can be used without delay after performing another action. Even among the Carian sword sorceries, this is a notably effective technique.

title: Carian Slicer
text: Purchase: Limgrave / Liurnia of the Lakes / Academy of Raya Lucaria / Roundtable Hold Sold for 1,500 Runes by Sorceress Sellen , Miriel, Pastor of Vows or Preceptor Seluvis after giving either of them the Royal House Scroll . Should the scroll be given to one of them and then have that instructor die before purchasing this Sorcery , then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them the respective tutor's Bell Bearing . WARNING: Should all three of Sellen, Miriel, and Seluvis die before giving any of them the scroll then this sorcery becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Carian Slicer
text: POWER: 230% SS A magical shortsword is summoned through the staff and gives a quick slash. This can be recast at a fairly good pace, similar to that of the physical weapon, with the FP cost and damage being fully repeated for each strike.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: Cherishing Fingers — Type: Sorcery ( Finger Sorcery ); Description: Surrounds the caster with a mesh of hefty fingers; FP Cost: 20; Stamina Cost: 20 (26); Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Cathedral of Manus Metyr; Int: 36; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: Cherishing Fingers is a sorcery spell in Shadow of the Erdtree . It is one of the Finger sorceries . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 Bugs 6 See also

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: A finger sorcery of Count Ymir , aspiring mother of fingers . Surrounds the caster with a mesh of hefty fingers that wards all manner of projectiles, whether magical or physical in nature, away from the caster. Charging enhances potency. The dear fingers look after their mother, or perhaps that is merely what the mother wishes to believe.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: Loot: Scadu Altus Found in the small graveyard attached to the Cathedral of Manus Metyr after completing Count Ymir 's questline.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: The caster raises a ring of fingers that deal Strike damage with an Attack Power equal to 253% of Sorcery Scaling . Charging increases the Attack Power to 447% of Sorcery Scaling. The fingers deflect incoming projectiles for the duration of the spell.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: Costs 20 FP per cast. Costs 20 Stamina per cast (26 when charged). Requires 1 Memory Slot to be equipped. Stance damage: 11 (15 when charged) Radius: 2.8 meters (3.2 meters when charged) Applies a stagger on hit, or a knockback when charged.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: Maternal Staff increases attack power by 15%. Finger Robe increases attack power by 8%.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: The fingers will still manifest if the caster is staggered after they begin to lower their staff.

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: This charged spell is not affected by the Godfrey Icon .

title: Cherishing Fingers
text: Briars of Sin Fleeting Microcosm Glinting Nail Glintstone Nail Glintstone Nails Thops's Barrier

title: Collapsing Stars

title: Collapsing Stars
text: Collapsing Stars is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Collapsing Stars
text: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces. Fires numerous gravitational projectiles. Any foes struck will be pulled toward the caster. Charging enhances potency. A gravitational technique mastered by the young Radahn . "I thank you for your tutelage, for now I can challenge the stars."

title: Collapsing Stars
text: Loot: War-Dead Catacombs Acquired from a treasure chest in the middle of the scarlet swamp water in the lower levels of the large hall where all the phantoms are fighting each other.

title: Comet
text: Comet is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Comet
text: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria . Fires a great magical comet. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. The greatest of the Karolos Conspectus's sorceries, that only a very few sorcerers have ever mastered. Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 26 to 24. Stamina cost reduced from 35 to 31.

title: Comet
text: Loot: Academy of Raya Lucaria Found on a corpse behind an Illusory Wall near the entrance to the Debate Parlor .

title: Comet Azur
text: Comet Azur — Type: Sorcery ( Primeval Sorcery ); Description: Fires a tremendous comet within a starry torrent; FP Cost: 40 (10); Stamina Cost: 34; Memory Slots: 3; Obtained: Primeval Sorcerer Azur; Int: 60; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Comet Azur
text: This article is a stub (missing data). You can help expand it . Comet Azur is a sorcery spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the primeval current sorceries . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 Trivia 6 See also 7 References

title: Comet Azur
text: Legendary sorcery devised by Azur , primeval sorcerer. Fires a tremendous comet in a torrent akin to the distant starry expanse, the place said to be the origin of glintstone . Hold to continue releasing the sorcery's power. When Azur glimpsed into the primeval current , he saw darkness. He was left both bewitched and fearful of the abyss .

title: Comet Azur
text: Quest Item: Hermit Village Comet Azur is obtained by interacting with Primeval Sorcerer Azur , found on the cliffs southeast of the Hermit Village in Mt. Gelmir .

title: Comet Azur
text: The caster channels for 3 seconds before releasing a torrent of energy that deals Magic damage, with an Attack Power equal to ???% of Sorcery Scaling per second. [citation needed] The beam continues as long as the casting button is held, consuming additional FP.

title: Comet Azur
text: Costs 46 FP per cast and drains 10 FP per sustained increment. [citation needed] Costs 34 Stamina per cast. Requires 3 Memory Slots to equip. Can be channeled until FP is depleted. Deals low Stance damage, but the beam's end deals more.

title: Comet Azur
text: Azur's Glintstone Crown boosts attack power and FP cost by 15%. Azur's Glintstone Staff reduces casting time and increases FP costs by 20%. Cerulean Hidden Tear removes FP costs for 15 seconds. Glintstone Scarab reduces FP cost by 15%. The Graven-School Talisman and Graven-Mass Talisman boost attack power by 4% and 8% respectively, stacking for a total of 12%. Magic Scorpion Charm boosts attack power by 12% (8% in PvP). Magic-Shrouding Cracked Tear boosts attack power by 20% (15% in PvP). Primal Glintstone Blade reduces FP cost by 25%. Radagon Icon reduces casting time by ??%. Terra Magica boosts attack power by 35%.

title: Comet Azur
text: The beam has long range and can pass through enemies. The beam’s direction cannot be adjusted once cast. Casting time is reduced by Dexterity , up to a maximum of 70 Dexterity. If cast immediately after applying the Cerulean Hidden Tear, it can be channeled without FP drain for up to 12 seconds. This spell is easily interrupted due to its long casting time. Most bosses and enemies will dodge when the spell is initially cast, not when the beam is released.

title: Comet Azur
text: Despite the academy 's ban on primeval sorceries, [ 1 ] Comet Azur is used by Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon .

title: Comet Azur
text: Elden Stars Founding Rain of Stars Light of Miquella Stars of Ruin Thops's Barrier

title: Crystal Barrage
text: Crystal Barrage — Type: Sorcery; Description: Fires a volley of glintstone crystal shards; FP Cost: 14 (2); Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Sellen; Buy Price: 1,500; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 23; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Crystal Barrage
text: Crystal Barrage is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Crystal Barrage
text: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria . Fires a volley of glintstone crystal shards. Charging increases potency. A sorcery of the Crystal Cadre, a group of sorcerers who pursue the wisdom of stone — the secrets locked in the faint cogitation of the Crystalians .

title: Crystal Barrage
text: Purchase: Limgrave / Liurnia of the Lakes / Academy of Raya Lucaria / Roundtable Hold . Sold for 1,500 Runes by Sorceress  Sellen in any of her locations other than Witchbane Ruins . Should Sellen die before purchasing this Sorcery from her, then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them Sellen's Bell Bearing .

title: Crystal Barrage
text: POWER (uncharged): 13.5% SS per bolt, 6 shots total (81% full barrage) POWER (charged): 13.5% SS per bolt, up to 23 shots total (310.5% at 48 FP full barrage) An astoundingly poor spell in PvE, without charging it has a terribly high cost for utterly miserable damage that's barely over half that of a single Glintstone Pebble , and if waiting to charge it this is extremely slow; simply spamming other spells will heavily outdamage it over time. Charging the attack does not increase the damage, it merely extends it for more shots at an additional 2 FP per shot, up to 17 extra bolts total. The one notable exception would be in Invasion situations, both players and NPC Bloody Fingers. Such highly evasive opponents would find it rather difficult to evade the entire barrage of a fully charged shot.

title: Crystal Burst
text: Crystal Burst — Type: Sorcery; Description: Fires a burst of glintstone crystal shards; FP Cost: 14; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Demi-Human Queen; Max. Held: 99; Int: 18; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Crystal Burst
text: Crystal Burst is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Crystal Burst
text: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a burst of glintstone crystal shards. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging increases potency. A sorcery of the Crystal Cadre, a group of sorcerers who pursued the wisdom of stone — the secrets locked in the faint cogitation of the Crystalians .

title: Crystal Burst
text: Guaranteed Drop: Weeping Peninsula Acquired from defeating the Demi-Human Queen of the Demi-Human Forest Ruins .

title: Crystal Burst
text: POWER (uncharged): 17% SS per pellet POWER (charged): 23% SS per pellet A shotgun-like blast of small pellets with rather extreme spread and each pellet does limited damage; only very close enemies will take decent damage from this. Rather FP-inefficient and limited range.

title: Crystal Release

title: Crystal Release
text: Crystal Release is a Sorcery spell in Elden Ring . If is one of the Crystalian Sorceries . Contents 1 Description 2 Effects 3 Acquisition 4 Notes 5 Trivia

title: Crystal Release
text: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians . Creates a mass of crystal , then shatters it to scour a wide area with a violent rain of crystal shards. This sorcery is used by high-ranking adepts among the Crystalians. Some also call this sorcery " the Crystal Sun ."

title: Crystal Release
text: Guaranteed Drop: Academy Crystal Cave Acquired from defeating the Crystalian duo guarding the end of the Academy Crystal Cave .

title: Crystal Release
text: Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 38 to 34.

title: Crystal Torrent

title: Crystal Torrent
text: Crystal Torrent is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Crystal Torrent
text: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians . Creates a mass of crystal, then fires off shards in rapid succession. Hold to continue firing shards. The wrath of the Crystalians encapsulated in sorcery. Each shard is of substantial size, making even a stray blow capable of inflicting a severe wound.

title: Crystal Torrent
text: Guaranteed Drop: Caelid Acquired from defeating the Putrid Crystalians the end of the Sellia Hideaway .

title: Eternal Darkness

title: Eternal Darkness
text: Loot: Caelid Acquired from a corpse inside the Swamp Lookout Tower .

title: Eternal Darkness
text: Greater Will , Astels , and Fallingstar Beasts live within a lightless void far away. Astel destroyed an Eternal City and stole its false night sky.

title: Eternal Darkness
text: Eternal Darkness creates a black hole .

title: Explosive Ghostflame
text: Explosive Ghostflame is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Explosive Ghostflame
text: Sorcery of the servants of Death . Strike the ground with the staff, triggering an explosion of ghostflame that burns the surrounding area. In the time when there was no Erdtree , death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire.

title: Explosive Ghostflame
text: Guaranteed Drop: Consecrated Snowfield Acquired from defeating the Death Rite Bird that roams the northern edge of the frozen river at night.

title: Fia's Mist
text: Fia's Mist is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Fia's Mist
text: Sorcery of Fia, the Deathbed Companion . Creates a deathly mist before the caster, which inflicts Death blight upon those who enter. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging enhances range of the mist. This sorcery was developed to oppose the Roundtable Hold , and is effective only against the Tarnished .

title: Fia's Mist
text: Guaranteed Drop: Deeproot Depths Acquired from defeating Fia's Champions .

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Fleeting Microcosm — Type: Sorcery ( Finger Sorcery ); Description: Conjures a microcosm that pulses with a single wave, disappearing in a burst; FP Cost: 26; Stamina Cost: 35 (46); Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Cathedral of Manus Metyr; Seller: Count Ymir; Buy Price: 20,000; Int: 42; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Fleeting Microcosm is a sorcery spell in Shadow of the Erdtree . It is one of the Finger sorceries . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 Trivia 6 See also 7 References

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: A finger sorcery of Count Ymir , High Priest. One of the secret hallowed rites. Conjures an image of a microcosm at a foe's feet that pulses with a single wave before disappearing in a burst. Charging enhances potency. The broken and discarded are fully willing to cling to fleeting simulacra, earning them some modicum of sympathy.

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Purchased : Cathedral of Manus Metyr Fleeting Microcosm may be purchased from Count Ymir for 20,000 Runes after ringing the bell at the Finger Ruins of Dheo . He sits on the throne in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr on the Scadu Altus , located in the Realm of Shadow .

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: The caster summons a microcosm at the target’s feet, dealing damage on pulse and again when it bursts. It inflicts Magic damage with an Attack Power of 120/214% of Incantation Scaling and 7/7 Stance damage within a 3.0/4.5-meter radius. Charging the spell increases its potency to 160/271% Incantation Scaling and 7/11 Stance damage within a 3.0/6.0-meter radius.

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Costs 26 FP per cast. Costs 35 Stamina per cast (46 when charged). Requires 1 Memory Slot to be equipped. This spell deals damage twice. The burst may knock down enemies. This spell cannot be cast while riding Torrent .

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Finger Robe boosts attack power by 8%. Maternal Staff boosts attack power by 15%. Godfrey Icon boosts the attack power of charged attacks by 15%.

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Fleeting Microcosm is a recreation of the microcosm held between the tail fingers of Metyr and the Staff of the Great Beyond . Metyr's microcosm once relayed information from the Greater Will . [ 1 ]

title: Fleeting Microcosm
text: Cherishing Fingers Elden Stars Eternal Darkness Founding Rain of Stars Great Oracular Bubble Spira

text: Founding Rain of Stars — Type: Sorcery ( Primeval Sorcery ); Description: Releases a downpour of star rain for a while; FP Cost: 32; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Heretical Rise; Int: 52; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Founding Rain of Stars
text: This article is a stub . You can help expand it . Founding Rain of Stars is a sorcery spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the primeval current sorceries . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Notes 4 See also

title: Founding Rain of Stars
text: The eldest primeval sorcery , said to have been discovered by an ancient astrologer . A sorcery of legendary status . Summons a dark cloud of stars overhead. Shortly after, the cloud will release a violent deluge of star rain. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging increases potency. Thought to be the founding glintstone sorcery . The glimpse of the primeval current that the astrologer saw became real, and the stars ' amber rained down on this land.

title: Founding Rain of Stars
text: Loot: Heretical Rise , Mountaintops of the Giants You'll need to walk over an invisible bridge across the valley directly east of the Snow Valley Ruins Overlook Site of Grace.

title: Founding Rain of Stars
text: Possibly connected to Catacombs Conjurers

title: Founding Rain of Stars
text: Comet Azur Elden Stars Rain of Fire Star-Lined Sword Stars of Ruin

title: Freezing Mist
text: Freezing Mist is a spell in Elden Ring .

title: Freezing Mist
text: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch . Releases a cold mist before the caster. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging enhances range of the mist. The snowy crone taught the young Ranni to fear the dark moon as she imparted her cold sorcery .

title: Freezing Mist
text: Purchase: Liurnia of the Lakes / Roundtable Hold Sold for 6,000 Runes by Preceptor Seluvis . Should Seluvis die before purchasing this Sorcery from him, then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them Seluvis's Bell Bearing .

text: Guaranteed Drop: Liurnia of the Lakes Acquired from felling a Scarab on the road northwest of the Behind Caria Manor Site of Grace .

title: Gavel of Haima
text: Gavel of Haima — Type: Sorcery; Description: Attacks using a magic greathammer; FP Cost: 25; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Converted Fringe Tower; Int: 25; Arc: 0; Fth: 0

title: Gavel of Haima
text: Gavel of Haima is a spell in Elden Ring . Slow, but powerful and does very extreme Stance damage.

title: Gavel of Haima
text: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria . Creates a magical greathammer and slams it down. Allows one follow-up attack. Drawn from the scholarly conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs might as a means to quell conflict.

title: Gavel of Haima
text: Same way as Cannon of Haima , by breaking the seal at the Converted Fringe Tower via Erudition gesture while wearing a glintstone crown.

title: Incantations
text: Incantations (祈祷, Kitō ; lit. "Prayers") are a type of spell in Elden Ring . All incantations require FP to cast, with most necessitating a high investment in the Faith stat. However, some incantations are based on Intelligence or Arcane . The Incantation Scaling varies depending on their stat requirements and the player's own stats. Incantations can only be cast using sacred seals , which act as the required catalyst . Contents 1 Schools of Incantation 2 List of incantations 3 Boosting incantations 4 Notes 4.1 Bugs 5 Gallery 6 See also 7 References

title: Incantations
text: The Clawmark Seal and Cinquedea boosts Bestial incantations by 10% each. The Dragon Communion Seal boosts Dragon Communion incantations by 15%. The Dryleaf Seal boosts specific Golden Order and Miquella's incantations by 15%. ( Discus of Light , Multilayered Ring of Light , Radagon's Rings of Light , & Triple Rings of Light only) The Fire Knight's Seal , Messmer's Helm / Messmer's Helm (Altered) , and Fire Knight Armor (not the Altered version) boosts Messmer's Flame incantations by 15%, 3%, and 4% respectively. The Frenzied Flame Seal boosts Frenzied Flame incantations by 20%. The Giant's Seal boosts Giants' Flame incantations by 20%. The incantations Catch Flame , Fire's Deadly Sin , and Flame Sling aren't boosted, as they lack a sigil. The Godslayer's Seal boosts Godslayer incantations (except for Noble Presence ) by 10%. Godskin Noble Robe boosts Noble Presence by 20%.

title: Incantations
text: The Golden Order Seal and Radiant Gold Mask boost Golden Order incantations by 10% each. The Gravel Stone Seal boosts Dragon Cult incantations by 15%. The Spiraltree Seal boosts Spiral incantations by 20%. Each piece of the Crucible Axe Set and Crucible Tree Set boosts Aspects of the Crucible incantations by 3.5% (14% total for a full set). The Divine Bird Helm boosts the effectiveness of Divine Bird Feathers by 10%. The Enraged Divine Beast talisman and Divine Beast Helm / Divine Beast Head boosts the effectiveness of Divine Beast Tornado by 10%. The Pelt of Ralva boosts the effectiveness of Roar of Rugalea by 15%.

title: Incantations
text: Flame of the Fell God , Greyoll's Roar , and Elden Stars are required to complete the Legendary Sorceries and Incantations achievement . No sacred seal boosts Bear Communion, Blood Oath, Divine Beast, Erdtree, Erdtree Worship, Servants of Rot, or Two Fingers incantations. The Erdtree Seal does not boost Erdtree or Erdtree Worship incantations. The Finger Seal does not boost Two Fingers incantations. The following incantations do not produce spell sigils and are unaffected by school-specific boosts: Catch Flame , Divine Beast Tornado , Divine Bird Feathers , Fire's Deadly Sin , Flame Sling , Roar of Rugalea , Placidusax's Ruin , and Watchful Spirit .

title: Incantations
text: The Dryleaf Seal does not boost the effectiveness of Light of Miquella . The Spiraltree Seal does not boost the effectiveness of Divine Beast Incantations.
