title: Agheel's Flame
text: Agheel's Flame — Type: Incantation ( Dragon Communion Incantation ); Description: Spews flame breath of Agheel from above; FP Cost: 36 (6); Stamina Cost: 60; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Dragon Communion Altar; Buy Price: 2 Dragon Hearts; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 15; Fth: 23

title: Agheel's Flame
text: Agheel's Flame is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Dragon Communion Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Agheel's Flame
text: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion . Channels the power of the flying dragon Agheel . Transforms the caster into a dragon to spew flaming breath from above. This incantation can be used while jumping and charging extends the duration. The dead gazed at the skies over the lakes of Limgrave , praying that the dragons' flames would burn them to ash.

title: Agheel's Flame
text: Dragon Communion: Caelid Acquired from the altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion in Caelid for 2 Dragon Hearts after defeating Flying Dragon Agheel .

title: Agheel's Flame
text: The caster floats up into the air and summons a dragon head, before breathing out a wave of flames, dealing Fire damage equal to 169% of Incantation Scaling up to 3 times (i.e., 507% of the same cumulatively) if the entire wave hits. Continue channeling the spell to let loose a second breath, also hitting up to 3 times.

title: Agheel's Flame
text: Costs 60 points of Stamina to cast, and another 60 points upon using the follow-up breath. Damage is boosted by 10% by the Roar Medallion . Damage is boosted by 15% per Dragon Communion Seal held in an active hand (2 max). Damage is boosted by 20% when the Rock Heart is used. This spell can be cast midair but cannot be cast while mounted, unlike Dragonfire . Compared to Dragonfire , this spell deals 17% more damage but also consumes 38% more FP . Casting this spell until it stops costs 144 FP: 2*36 FP from the two breaths and 12*6 FP from keeping the spell running. Only 79 FP is actually needed for the entire routine. This is just enough to start the second breath, and thereafter the game does not care that no FP remains as it will continue casting regardless.

title: Agheel's Flame
text: This is the third strongest "named" dragon breath attack, dealing 0.5% less damage than Ghostflame Breath and 10% less damage than Smarag's Glintstone Breath if an enemy's Fire Damage Negation and Magic Damage Negation is equal. Deals 20% less damage against other players.

title: Agheel's Flame
text: Patch 1.07 the power of the following incantations in PvP has been decreased. The multiplier for damage against other players was lowered from 100% to 80%.

title: Agheel's Flame
text: Borealis's Mist , a weaker Magic damage version of this spell that also inflicts Frostbite Dragonfire , a weaker but cheaper version of this spell Ekzykes's Decay , a weaker Standard damage of this spell that also inflicts Scarlet Rot Ghostflame Breath , a slightly stronger Magic damage version of this spell that also inflicts some Frostbite Smarag's Glintstone Breath , a stronger Magic damage version of this spell

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear — Type: Incantation ( Dragon Cult Incantation ); Description: Stabs with red lightning spear from above; FP Cost: 25; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Ancient Dragon Prayerbook; Buy Price: 8,500; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 32

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Dragon Cult Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: A secret incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult . Creates a spear of red lightning and stabs it into the ground from above. On impact, the spear will burst into trails of lightning covering the area. Spoken of in legend, red lightning is the weapon wielded by the ancient dragons .

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Purchase: Roundtable Hold / Liurnia of the Lakes / Altus Plateau / Leyndell, Royal Capital / Mountaintops of the Giants Sold for 8,500 Runes by Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either of them the Ancient Dragon Prayerbook . Should the prayerbook be given to one of them and then have that instructor die before purchasing this Incantation , then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them the respective tutor's Bell Bearing . WARNING: Should both Corhyn and Miriel die before giving either of them the prayerbook then this incantation becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Calls on a red, crackling spear from above that is then slammed into the ground, hitting with Lightning Attack Power equal to 360% of Incantation Scaling in a small 0.2 meter radius, and creating a shockwave with a 3 meter radius that hits with Lightning Attack Power equal to 285% of Incantation Scaling. From the point of impact, waves of red lightning are sent out directly ahead and behind, and to the left and right of the caster with Lightning Attack Power equal to 122% of Incantation Scaling in a 2 meter radius from the center of each wave.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Casting the spell costs 29 points of Stamina . Deals 17 Stance damage on a direct or shockwave hit and 5 Stance damage on a wave hit. Attack Power is boosted by 15% per Gravel Stone Seal held in an active hand (2 max). Attack Power is boosted by 2% per piece of the Death Knight Set that is being worn. The "direct" hit and the initial area attack cannot hit the same target, though the smaller, weakest waves can hit an enemy that has already been hit if they are either quick or large enough to also be where those are. The "spear" is actually flung downwards, meaning it can be used to hit the ground beneath a cliff if the caster is standing on its edge. Casts faster than Fortissax's Lightning Spear , but is much weaker overall and per hit.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Like other red lightning incantations, this spell doesn't actually make the caster create a bolt of lightning in the hand, instead summoning the bolt from somewhere above them. Patch 1.07 decreased FP consumption and increased stamina attack power against guarded enemies. FP cost was decreased from 30 to 25. Only the direct hit had its Stamina Attack Power increased against guarding enemies, from 100 to 140. Separate Stamina Attack Power values were added for guarding players: for a direct hit, it was increased from 140 to 175; for a near hit, it was increased from 100 to 125; and for a far away hit, it was increased from 60 to 75. Patch 1.04 included an undocumented change which reduced the FP cost of this incantation. FP cost was decreased from 42 to 30.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
text: Adula's Moonblade Carian Greatsword Fortissax's Lightning Spear , a version of this incantation that hits twice Lansseax's Glaive , a more sweeping version of this spell

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike — Type: Incantation ( Dragon Cult Incantation ); Description: Summons red lightning that spreads from impact; FP Cost: 27; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Ancient Dragon Prayerbook; Buy Price: 10,500; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 26

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Dragon Cult Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: A secret incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult . Summons a red bolt of lightning that scatters and spreads around the surrounding area. Charging enhances the range of the lightning bolt. Spoken of in legend, red lightning is the weapon wielded by the ancient dragons .

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Purchase: Roundtable Hold / Liurnia of the Lakes / Altus Plateau / Leyndell, Royal Capital / Mountaintops of the Giants Sold for 10,500 Runes by Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either of them the Ancient Dragon Prayerbook . Should the prayerbook be given to one of them and then have that instructor die before purchasing this Incantation , then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them the respective tutor's Bell Bearing . WARNING: Should both Corhyn and Miriel die before giving either of them the prayerbook then this incantation becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Sends out rows of bolts in all directions, hitting at regular intervals with Lightning Attack Power equal to 317% of Incantation Scaling . Charging the spell sends out additional bolts to extend the range slighly and increases the Attack Power of each hit to 379% of Incantation Scaling.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Casting the spell costs 31 points of Stamina . Charging the spell increases the cost to 40 points of Stamina. Deals 5 Stance damage per hit. Charging the spell increases this to 9 Stance damage per hit. Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 19%, wearing this talisman increases the Attack Power by a total of 37%. Attack Power is boosted by 15% per Gravel Stone Seal held in an active hand (2 max). Attack Power is boosted by 2% per piece of the Death Knight Set that is being worn. If the incantation hits a watery surface or an enemy standing on such a surface, a small area of effect attack with Lightning Attack Power equal to 50% of Incantation Scaling will be created that can hit the target foes and any adjacent enemies.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Also deals 2 Stance damage regardless of if the original Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike was charged or not. This is one of the game's strongest attacks, capable of dealing over ten thousand damage to larger bosses such as the Dragonlord or the God-Devouring Serpent , even if they are resistant to Lightning, but even smaller, human-sized enemies will take heavy damage in the thousands if hit by just one or two bolts. This spell sometimes fails to do anything when cast under low-level roofs.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Unlike other red lightning incantations, this spell doesn't summon its bolts bolt from somewhere above them, instead creating them from the used Sacred Seal . Patch 1.04 decreased recovery time. Patch 1.03.3 included an undocumented changed which increased the FP cost of this incantation. FP cost was increased from 27 to 36.

title: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom , another area of effect striking incantation, but with Holy damage Death Lightning , a more inaccurate and spread out but stronger version of this spell Elden Stars Founding Rain of Stars , a sorcery with a similar but much, much weaker damage

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Creates a miranda flower on chest to summon rain of light; FP Cost: 23; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Ancient Ruins of Rauh; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 27

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom is an incantation spell in Shadow of the Erdtree . It is one of the Erdtree incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Aspect of the Crucible discovered in the ancient ruins . Creates a miranda flower on one's chest before calling down a rain of light. Charging increases potency. In an age long past, before this land was enshrouded in shadow, the vitality of the Crucible flourished.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom is found in the upper sections of the Ancient Ruins of Rauh . From the Rauh Ancient Ruins, East site of grace , head across the bridge just to the west, then drop down to a slightly lower bridge section at the end.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Sprouts a flower from the user's chest, creating a rain of light around them that lasts for 4 seconds and has Holy Attack Power equal to 80% of Incantation Scaling per hit. Charging the spell increases the Attack Power per hit to 100% of Incantation Scaling.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Costs 20 points of Stamina to cast. Charging the spell increases the cost to 26 points of Stamina. Attack Power is boosted by wearing pieces of the Crucible Set (4% per piece, 17% for the whole set because 1.04^4 = 1.17). Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 25%, wearing this talisman increases Attack Power by a total of 44%. Can deal decent damage against large foes such as Dragons , but more mobile or smaller foes will likely only be hit once or twice for minimal damage. There is about a 2-second delay before the rain of light begins after casting the spell.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: This spell is very similar to the light spell used by Miranda Blossoms , Melina , and the cut Miranda's Prayer tool . However, this spell creates a flower at the beginning of its cast. Patch 1.14 increased attack speed, increased the size of the hitbox, and shortened the recovery time between using this incantation and follow-up actions.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom
text: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings Aspects of the Crucible: Breath Aspects of the Crucible: Horns Aspects of the Crucible: Tail Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns Miranda's Prayer

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Creates throat pouch to spew fire while walking; FP Cost: 28 (4); Memory Slots: 1; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 27

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Erdtree incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations . Creates a throat pouch on the caster's neck, allowing them to spew fiery breath while walking. Charging increases the duration of the breath. This is a manifestation of the Erdtree 's primal vital energies—an aspect of the primordial crucible , where all life was once blended together.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath is acquired upon defeating Tanith's Knight , which can be fought after killing Tanith in Rykard 's arena in the Volcano Manor , at the end of her questline.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: Creates a large pouch on the caster's neck before breathing out tongues of flame with Fire Attack Power equal to 98% of Incantation Scaling .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: Costs 40 points of Stamina to cast. Attack Power is boosted by 10% by the Roar Medallion . Attack Power is boosted by wearing pieces of the Crucible Set (4% per piece, 17% for the whole set because 1.04^4 = 1.17). Doesn't immediately start to consume FP for the upkeep cost, instead only starting after about 2-3 seconds. This seems to coincide with the initially created throat pouch shrinking to roughly the width of the character's torso. The caster must always move forward at a walking pace as long as this spell is being channeled. Decent in PvP as a "wake-up" attack (i.e., after an attack that has knocked down an opponent, such as a Critical Attack ), since it has a relatively short start-up animation and a wide attack area, which can cause the additional damage needed to finish off a target.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: This spell is used by Crucible Axe Knights (except for the two found in Limgrave ). Aspects of the Crucible: Breath creates a throat pouch similar to those of the basilisks .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Breath
text: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom Aspects of the Crucible: Horns Aspects of the Crucible: Tail Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Creates shoulder horn to gore foes from a low stance.; FP Cost: 18; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Defeat Crucible Knight ( Stormveil Castle ); Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 27

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Erdtree incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations . Creates a mighty horn on the caster's shoulder to gore foes from a low stance. Charging allows the caster to barrel into foes before delivering the final attack. This is a manifestation of the Erdtree 's primal vital energies—an aspect of the primordial crucible , where all life was once blended together.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns is acquired by defeating the Crucible Knight in Stormveil Castle , down the outer western rampart. From the Rampart Tower Site of Grace, head north to the walkway with the Warhawks , and drop down to the left at the guard tower. Continue dropping down until you reach a breakable cliff and fall through it to arrive on a cliffside with the Crucible Knight.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: The caster crouches slightly and creates a horn on their shoulder before dashing a few steps forward, hitting with Standard Attack Power equal to 277% of Incantation Scaling upon contact with the horn. Charging the spell increases the Attack Power to 327% of Incantation Scaling and greatly increases the distance charged, to about three times the previous amount, launching any human-sized foes that are hit.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: Costs 38 points of Stamina to cast. Charging the spell increases the cost to 49 points of Stamina. Attack Power is boosted by wearing pieces of the Crucible Set (4% per piece, 17% for the whole set because 1.04^4 = 1.17). Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 18%, wearing this talisman increases Attack Power by a total of 36%. Deals 16 Stance damage when uncharged and 30 Stance damage when charged. The charged version of the spell is generally much better than the uncharged version, primarily due to the increased distance traveled and the ability to launch smaller foes into the air.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: This spell is used by Crucible Tree Knights , though they summon it on their arm. Despite this, the spell is dropped by a Crucible Axe Knight. Patch 1.07 decreased FP consumption and increased stamina attack power against guarded enemies. FP cost was reduced from 20 to 18, and damage to Stamina of guarding enemies was increased from 200 to 240 for the uncharged version and from 260 to 300 for the charged version. Patch 1.04 decreased FP and Stamina cost, increased cast speed, increased the distance traveled when not charged, and made it easier to cause enemies to flinch when charged. FP cost was reduced from 30 to 20.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Horns
text: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom Aspects of the Crucible: Breath Aspects of the Crucible: Tail Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Creates supple tail to sweep area before caster; FP Cost: 20; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Stormhill Evergaol; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 27

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is an Erdtree incantation . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Creates a supple tail that sweeps through foes before the caster. Charging enhances potency. This is a manifestation of the Erdtree 's primal vital energies - an aspect of the primordial crucible , where all life was once blended together.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail is acquired by defeating the Crucible Knight trapped in the Stormhill Evergaol , located in Stormhill .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Creates a tail that swings in front of the caster with Standard Attack Power equal to 202% of Incantation Scaling . If charged, it adds a second, larger swing, dealing Standard Attack Power equal to 274% of Incantation Scaling .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Costs 42 points of Stamina to cast, whether charged or uncharged. Attack Power is boosted by wearing pieces of the Crucible Set (4% per piece, 17% for the whole set because 1.04^4 = 1.17). Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 36%, wearing this talisman increases Attack Power by a total of 56%. The first swing deals 13 Stance damage, and the second swing deals 39 Stance damage. This means that the charged version of the spell can deal up to 52 Stance damage, greater than even a hammer-type Colossal Weapon 's charged heavy attack, allowing it to break the stance of many enemies within two hits. The spell goes through obstacles, making it decent for ambushing foes by using thin walls as cover. It is a bit slow to cast and has about a second of recovery time after the spell finishes casting.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Launches smaller foes backward if it hits them.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: This is the spell used by Crucible Axe Knights . Patch 1.07 decreased FP consumption and increased stamina attack power against guarded enemies. FP cost was reduced from 22 to 20, and stamina damage to guarding enemies was increased from 180 to 200 on the first swipe and from 240 to 270 on the second swipe. Patch 1.04 decreased FP and Stamina cost. FP cost was reduced from 32 to 22.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Tail
text: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom Aspects of the Crucible: Breath Aspects of the Crucible: Horns Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Creates a mass of bristling thorns on back to scour the area; FP Cost: 14; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Shadow Keep; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 27

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns is an incantation spell in Shadow of the Erdtree . It is one of the Erdtree incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 Gallery 7 See also

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Aspect of the Crucible that manifested in golden hippopotami . Creates a bristling mass of thorn-like fur on the caster's back before scouring the area by rolling around on the ground. Charging increases the number of rolls and range of attack. In an age long past, before this land was enshrouded in shadow, the vitality of the Crucible flourished. Remains of this can be seen in the ancient ruins .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns is acquired by defeating the Golden Hippopotamus boss found just inside the main gate of Shadow Keep on Scadu Altus .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Sprouts spines from the back and rolls sideways on the ground, throwing them around the user, dealing Pierce Attack Power equal to 45% of Incantation Scaling per hit, hitting up to 10 times (450% of Incantation Scaling in total). [verification needed] The spell can be charged to spin twice, increasing the maximum number of hits to 15 and moving forward. These extra attacks deal Attack Power equal to 120% of Incantation Scaling per hit (600% of Incantation Scaling for the extra hits or 1000% of Incantation Scaling in total).

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Costs 29 points of Stamina to cast. Charging the spell increases the cost to 38 points of Stamina. Attack Power is boosted by wearing pieces of the Crucible Set (4% per piece, 17% for the whole set because 1.04^4 = 1.17). Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 122%, wearing this talisman increases Attack Power by a total of 156%. The very low height of the user when casting this spell means that high-centered thrusting or horizontal attacks can easily miss them. The charged version's increased forward momentum makes it even better at evading attacks. Since this Incantation deals Pierce damage, it will occasionally deal a Counter Hit against an attacking foe, increasing the Attack Power of that specific hit by 30%.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Note that this will most likely result in an overall 2-3% damage increase per Counter Hit since each is only a portion of the total damage. Since this isn't a weapon, it does NOT benefit from the Spear Talisman .

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Patch 1.14 increased attack power and stamina attack power against guarding enemies. The close-range hitbox now follows the movement of the player. The attack power was increased from 40% of Incantation Scaling to 45% for the uncharged hits and most of the charged hits, while the increase was from 70% to 120% of Incantation Scaling for the stronger charged hits. Stamina attack power against guarding enemies was only increased for the charged hits, going from 50 to 85 against PvE enemies and from 62 to 106 against other players.

title: Aspects of the Crucible: Thorns
text: Thorns promotional art

text: Ash of War: Aspects of the Crucible: Wings Aspects of the Crucible: Bloom Aspects of the Crucible: Breath Aspects of the Crucible: Horns Aspects of the Crucible: Tail

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Assassin's Approach — Type: Incantation ( Two Fingers Incantation ); Description: Silences footsteps, reduces fall damage / sound; FP Cost: 15; Stamina Cost: 13; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Assassin's Prayerbook; Seller: Brother Corhyn or Miriel; Buy Price: 2,000; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 10

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Assassin's Approach is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Two Fingers incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Strategies 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Incantation of the Two Fingers' servants, who once served as the assassins of the Roundtable Hold . Completely silences the footsteps of the caster. Additionally, reduces fall damage and the sound produced by falling. This incantation can be cast while in motion or crouching. The assassins were charged with eliminating Tarnished who had strayed from guidance .

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Purchase: Roundtable Hold / Liurnia of the Lakes / Altus Plateau / Leyndell, Royal Capital / Mountaintops of the Giants Starting spell for the Confessor origin . Sold for 2,000 Runes by Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either of them the Assassin's Prayerbook . Should the prayerbook be given to one of them and then that instructor die before purchasing this Incantation , the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them the respective tutor's Bell Bearing . WARNING: Should both Corhyn and Miriel die before giving either of them the prayerbook, this incantation becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Assassin's Approach applies a Buff that silences footsteps and prevents all non-lethal fall damage for 30 seconds.

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Costs 15 FP per cast. Costs 13 Stamina per cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot to be equipped. Non-lethal fall damage is only negated for falls between 16 and 20 meters, meaning this incantation does not prevent guaranteed deaths from falls of 20 meters or more. Overrides and is overridden by Soft Cotton .

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Generally outclassed by Soft Cotton , which is an easy-to-acquire consumable tool that costs no FP to activate. However, Soft Cotton lasts only 20 seconds and cannot be crafted during combat.

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Update 1.03 (undocumented) increased FP cost from 12 to 15. Update 1.07 extended the duration of this spell from 20 seconds to 30 seconds.

title: Assassin's Approach
text: Darkness Longtail Cat Talisman , a talisman that eliminates non-lethal fall damage Miriam's Vanishing Shadow Bait Unseen Form

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Barrier of Gold — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Worship Incantation ); Description: Greatly increases magic damage negation for self & allies; FP Cost: 30; Stamina Cost: 13; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Guaranteed drop from Leyndell, Royal Capital; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 24

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Barrier of Gold is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Erdtree Worship Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 5 See also

title: Barrier of Gold
text: One of the incantations of Erdtree Worship. Greatly increases magic damage negation for the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. This incantation was used by the champions of the Erdtree in the First and the Second Liurnian Wars , during which the red-haired Radagon joined the heroes' ranks.

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Guaranteed Drop: Leyndell, Royal Capital Drops from an invisible Scarab rolling back and forth on the path patrolled by a Crucible Tree Knight , north of the Erdtree Sanctuary Site of Grace , past the elevator downwards. WARNING: If Maliketh, the Black Blade is defeated before this incantation is acquired it becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Grants a Body Buff that decreases Magic damage taken by 60% (20% in PvP) for 70 seconds for caster and allies within a 6 meter radius.

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Costs 13 points of Stamina to cast. Overall a very strong defensive incantation, if one that comes a bit late and will most likely come after the Magic-heavy area of Liurnia of the Lakes , with only the Astels and Loretta being the major Magic damage bosses left. Since it doesn't actually apply a flat increase to damage negation, just the damage taken, the actual effective new damage negation (the one shown on the character screen) can be calculated with the following formula: 1 - (1 - (current Magic damage negation)/100) * (1 - 0.60). As an example, if Magic damage negation before casting the incantation is 25.000 the result becomes this: 1 - (1 - 25.000/100) * (1 - 0.60) = 0.7, or 70.0% Magic damage negation. Against other players, simply replace the 0.60 with 0.20 for a new end result of 40.0% Magic damage negation.

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Since it's effectively the damage taken that is reduced, the higher Magic damage negation stat a character has before casting the spell the less effective it may appear to be in the statistics.

title: Barrier of Gold
text: Golden Lightning Fortification , a variant that reduces Lightning damage. Magic Fortification , a weaker, personal version of this incantation Protection of the Erdtree Spelldrake Talisman , a talisman granting Magic damage negation Spellproof Dried Liver , a consumable item granting much weaker damage negation at no cost except materials

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Bayle's Flame Lightning — Type: Incantation ( Dragon Communion Incantation ); Description: Channels dread dragon to strike with flame - lightning -infused talon bone; FP Cost: 43; Memory Slots: 2; Obtained: Heart of Bayle; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 53; Fth: 0

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Bayle's Flame Lightning is an incantation spell in Shadow of the Erdtree . It is one of the Dragon Communion Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: One of the greatest Dragon Communion incantations . Harnesses the fearsome power of Bayle the Dread . Channels the form of the dread dragon in the right arm to smash foes with an exposed talon bone coursing with flame lightning . Even after being consumed, the throbbing heart of Bayle continues to resist its subjugation, never weakening. One day, the fire within will consume the very body and soul of its Communion devourer. One day.

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Dragon Communion: Foot of the Jagged Peak Trade the Heart of Bayle at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion . Mutually exclusive with Bayle's Tyranny , as the Heart of Bayle and its reward cannot be duplicated.

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Summons one of Bayle's arms to slam down with, causing an explosion around the point of impact. A direct hit deals Standard damage equal to 250% of Incantation Scaling , Lightning damage equal to 280% of the same, and Fire damage equal to 220% of the same, while an enemy that isn't directly hit but moves into the point of impact afterward is dealt Lightning damage equal to 200% of Incantation Scaling and Fire damage equal to 150% of the same. Enemies just outside of the hit area take Fire damage equal to 30% of Incantation Scaling and Lightning damage equal to 15% of the same.

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Damage is boosted by 15% per Dragon Communion Seal held in an active hand (2 max). Damage is boosted by 20% when the Rock Heart is used. Has some Hyperarmor when cast, and can thus resist a hit or two from most foes before being knocked down on the ground. While it does partially do Lightning damage, it won't cause the same spreading aftershocks on water that other Lightning damage spells do.

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Patch 1.14 increased attack power. This increased the damage of the initial hit, with the Lightning attack power going from 250% of Incantation Scaling to 280% of the same and the Fire attack power going from 190% of Incantation Scaling to 220% of the same.

title: Bayle's Flame Lightning
text: Agheel's Flame Bayle's Tyranny Dragon King's Cragblade Dragonbolt of Florissax Dragonclaw Placidusax's Ruin

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Bayle's Tyranny — Type: Incantation ( Dragon Communion Incantation ); Description: Channels dread dragon to roar with a heatwave blast; FP Cost: 46; Memory Slots: 2; Obtained: Heart of Bayle; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 49; Fth: 0

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Bayle's Tyranny is an incantation spell in Shadow of the Erdtree . It is one of the Dragon Communion Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: One of the greatest Dragon Communion incantations. Harnesses the fearsome power of Bayle the Dread . Channels the form of the dread dragon to emit a mighty roar accompanied by a heatwave burst, causing violent eruptions of fire in the area. Even after being consumed, the throbbing heart of Bayle continues to resist its subjugation, never weakening. One day, the fire within will consume the very body and soul of its Communion devourer. One day.

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Dragon Communion: Foot of the Jagged Peak Trade the Heart of Bayle at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion . Mutually exclusive with Bayle's Flame Lightning , as the Heart of Bayle and its reward cannot be duplicated.

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Summons the head of Bayle to unleash a shockingly fiery roar, dealing Fire damage equal to 325% of Incantation Scaling and Lightning damage equal to 210% of the same, and creating patches of heat a short distance away from the caster that can hit up to 7 times for Fire damage equal to 50% of Incantation Scaling and Lightning damage equal to 20% of the same per hit.

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Damage is boosted by 15% per Dragon Communion Seal held in an active hand (2 max). Damage is boosted by 15% by the Talisman of the Dread . Damage is boosted by 20% when the Rock Heart is used. The initial explosion deals about two-thirds of its damage, and the remaining heatwave deals the remaining third in 7 ticks of damage. Benefits from boosts to both Fire damage and Lightning damage, though more so the former than the latter.

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Patch 1.14 fixed a bug where some attacks of the Bayle’s Tyranny incantation did not hit multiple enemies and fixed a bug that caused the attack of the Bayle’s Tyranny incantation to go through certain terrain. Prior to this update, the initial roar would only hit at most one enemy, regardless of how many were in range.

title: Bayle's Tyranny
text: Bayle's Flame Lightning , another powerful incantation associated with Bayle Dragonbolt of Florissax Greyoll's Roar Howl of Shabriri Placidusax's Ruin Roar of Rugalea

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Beast Claw (Spell) — Type: Incantation ( Bestial Incantation ); Description: Creates beast claws that tear through the land; FP Cost: 10; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Give Gurranq five Deathroot; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 8

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: | For the weapon, seek Beast Claw (weapon) . Beast Claw is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Bestial Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 Trivia 6 See also 7 References

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman . Creates beast claws that rend the land with shockwaves. Charging enhances potency. This incantation represents the fury of Gurranq, his bestial nature returned, as much as it does his restless agitation.

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Quest Item: Bestial Sanctum , Greyoll's Dragonbarrow Beast Claw is rewarded from Gurranq after giving him the fifth Deathroot . (If Gurranq is hostile after consuming the fourth Deathroot, he may be calmed down by reducing his HP .)

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Put a hand into the ground and swipe forwards to unleash a cone of shearing claws that have Slash Attack Power equal to 193% of Incantation Scaling . Charging the spell increases the Attack Power to 222% of Incantation Scaling.

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Costs 10 points of FP to cast. Costs 27 points of Stamina to cast. Charging the spell increases Stamina cost to 35 points. Requires 1 Memory Slot . Deals 7 Stance damage. Charging the spell increases Stance damage to 12.95.

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Bloodboil Aromatic increases Physical Attack Power by 30% (20% in PvP) for 60 seconds as a Body Buff . Blue Dancer Charm increases Physical Attack Power by up to 15% at low carried Equip Load values. Cinquedea increases Attack Power by 10% when held in an active hand, and by 21% when wielded in each hand (stacks with Clawmark Seal). Clawmark Seal increases Attack Power by 10% when held in an active hand, and by 21% when wielded in each hand (stacks with Cinquedea). Exalted Flesh increases Physical Attack Power by 20% (15% in PvP) for 30 seconds as a Body Buff . Flame, Grant Me Strength increases Physical Attack Power by 20% (15% in PvP) for 30 seconds as a Body Buff . Uplifting Aromatic increases Physical Attack Power 10% (7.5% in PvP) for 40 seconds as an Aura Buff . Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon .

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 15%, this increases the Attack Power by a total of 32%.

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Slash is a very give-and-take damage type, as naked and cloth-wearing enemies (such as Omens and Margit, the Fell Omen ) are weak or less resistant to the damage type, while armored and scaled or rock-like enemies (such as Banished Knights , Dragons , and Sentry Stones ) are far more resistant to it than other Physical damage types. Can be jumped over.

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Used by D, Hunter of the Dead , Gurranq, Beast Clergyman , Magnus the Beast Claw , and certain Vulgar Militia . Was wielded by the version of the Prophet found in the Elden Ring Closed Network Test . The Beast Claw has five "fingers", the signifier of a beast's intelligence [ 1 ] . Patch 1.07 : Increased the range of the shockwave. Patch 1.07 : (Bug Fixes) Fixed a bug where recovery time after casting Beast Claw could not be shortened by magic or incantations.

title: Beast Claw (Spell)
text: Unique Skill: Regal Beastclaw , a very similar effect found as a skill on the Beastclaw Greathammer Gurranq's Beast Claw , a stronger version which hits all around the user

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Bestial Constitution — Type: Incantation ( Bestial Incantation ); Description: Alleviates blood loss and frost buildup; FP Cost: 10; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Defeat Scarab ( Farum Greatbridge ); Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 9

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Bestial Constitution is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Bestial Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 4.1 Strategies 5 See also

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman . Fills the body with bestial vigor , alleviating buildup of frost and blood loss . Having gained intelligence , the beasts must have felt how their wildness slipped away as civilization took hold.

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Guaranteed Drop: Greyoll's Dragonbarrow Bestial Constitution drops from a Scarab near the western cliffs on the southern side of Farum Greatbridge .

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Removes any Blood Loss and Frostbite build-up on the caster, and removes any applied Frostbite .

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Costs 10 FP per cast. Costs 10 Stamina per cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot to equip. Can move slowly while casting.

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Somewhat limited in utility, as Blood Loss and Frostbite are usually quickly applied with no time to counter and provide their respective effect immediately upon being applied (except for Frostbite's lasting defence debuff).

title: Bestial Constitution
text: Flame, Cleanse Me , another incantation that can remove Frostbite (albeit incidentally), in addition to Poison and Scarlet Rot Lord's Aid , another incantation that can remove Blood Loss , in addition to Poison and Sleep Speckled Hardtear , a Crystal Tear that removes all Status Effects and build-up Stanching Boluses , a Blood Loss -only consumable equivalent Thawfrost Boluses , a Frostbite -only consumable equivalent

title: Bestial Sling
text: Bestial Sling — Type: Incantation ( Bestial Incantation ); Description: Swiftly flings numerous sharp rock shards; FP Cost: 10; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Give Gurranq two Deathroot; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 7

title: Bestial Sling
text: Bestial Sling is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Bestial Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Bestial Sling
text: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman . Swiftly flings a number of sharp rock shards. This incantation can be cast without delay after performing another action. It is said that in the time before the Erdtree , stones were the first weapons of the beasts who had gained intelligence .

title: Bestial Sling
text: Quest Item: Greyoll's Dragonbarrow Bestial Sling is rewarded from Gurranq after giving him the second Deathroot .

title: Bestial Sling
text: Throw out a fistful of stone shards with Standard Attack Power equal to 87% of Incantation Scaling . Hits twice at melee range.

title: Bestial Sling
text: Costs 21 points of FP to cast. Costs 19 points of Stamina to cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot . Deals 4 Stance damage.

title: Bestial Sling
text: Bloodboil Aromatic increases Physical Attack Power by 30% (20% in PvP) for 60 seconds as a Body Buff . Blue Dancer Charm increases Physical Attack Power by up to 15% at low carried Equip Load values. Cinquedea increases Attack Power by 10% when held in an active hand, and by 21% when wielded in each hand (stacks with Clawmark Seal). Clawmark Seal increases Attack Power by 10% when held in an active hand, and by 21% when wielded in each hand (stacks with Cinquedea). Exalted Flesh increases Physical Attack Power by 20% (15% in PvP) for 30 seconds as a Body Buff . Flame, Grant Me Strength increases Physical Attack Power by 20% (15% in PvP) for 30 seconds as a Body Buff . Uplifting Aromatic increases Physical Attack Power 10% (7.5% in PvP) for 40 seconds as an Aura Buff . Range is slightly increased by the Arrow's Reach Talisman , decreasing damage fall-off.

title: Bestial Sling
text: Has Attack Power equal to 174% of Incantation Scaling (not accounting for flat defence) at melee ( Daggers ) range due to hitting twice there. Deals pretty low damage but is excellent for harassing passive or low-health enemy players. Since it casts so quickly it can easily be spammed against an opponent to force them on the back foot.

title: Bestial Sling
text: Used by Gurranq, Beast Clergyman . Patch 1.12 (PvP-Exclusive Balance Adjustments): Decreased poise damage. Poise damage against other players was decreased from 54 to 26. Patch 1.08 : Reduced the poise damage of the Incantation Bestial Sling. This update actually had no effect. Patch 1.07 : Reduced the stone fragment scatter randomness. Increased stamina attack power against guarding enemies. Reduced between two hits and adjusted the detection so that two hits are always made at close range. Decreased poise damage. Stamina Attack Power against guarding enemies was increased from 40 to 60. Against guarding players the Stamina Attack Power was instead increased to 75. The incantation can now hit twice at very short melee range. Only Stance damage was decreased, from 5 to 4. Poise damage was increased from 50 to 54.

title: Bestial Sling
text: Rock Sling , a sorcery counterpart, if with larger and stronger projectiles Stone of Gurranq , a considerably larger rock-throwing incantation

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Bestial Vitality — Type: Incantation ( Bestial Incantation ); Description: Restores HP over a period of time; FP Cost: 18; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Give Gurranq three Deathroot; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 12

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Bestial Vitality is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Bestial Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman . Fills the body with bestial vigor , restoring HP over a period of time. Having gained intelligence , the beasts must have felt how their wildness slipped away as civilization took hold.

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Quest Item: Bestial Sanctum , Greyoll's Dragonbarrow Bestial Vitality is rewarded from Gurranq after giving him the third Deathroot .

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Infuses the body with bestial vigor to grant health regeneration to them, healing 5 HP per second for 120 seconds (600 HP in total).

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Costs 18 FP per cast. Costs 10 Stamina per cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot to equip. Can move slowly during casting.

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Old Lord's Talisman extends both the duration and total healing by 30%, increasing the total HP restored to 780.

title: Bestial Vitality
text: The HP regeneration effect stacks with the Blessed Dew Talisman and Icon Shield , but not with Blessing's Boon , Blessing of the Erdtree , or Crimsonburst Crystal Tear . This is the only HP regenerating incantation that is caster-only, but it's also the most FP -efficient one, letting the caster slowly regain their health during their travels (or simply cower in a corner over the fairly long duration).

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Flame, Grant Me Strength has the same icon for its spell scroll, just red instead of beige.

title: Bestial Vitality
text: Blessed Dew Talisman , a Talisman that also grants a weak, stackable health regeneration effect Crimsonburst Crystal Tear , a Crystal Tear that also grants a self-only HP -regeneration effect

title: Black Blade
text: Black Blade — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Black blade spinning slash that emits wave of light; FP Cost: 26; Memory Slots: 2; Obtained: Remembrance of the Black Blade; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 46

title: Black Blade
text: | For the character, seek Maliketh, the Black Blade . For the weapon, seek Maliketh's Black Blade . Black Blade is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Erdtree Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Black Blade
text: Power gleaned from the remembrance of Maliketh . Caster creates an illusory black blade , then leaps forward to deliver a spinning slash that emits a wave of light. This can be followed up with one additional attack. This blade was once imbued with Destined Death . In addition to dealing damage, it reduces foes' maximum HP and continues to sap their current HP for a very short time.

title: Black Blade
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Black Blade , dropped by Maliketh, the Black Blade , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Black Blade
text: Summons a red, spectral version of Maliketh's Black Blade , then jumps and spins forwards with the blade to hit for Holy Attack Power equal to 225% of Incantation Scaling while also sending out a wave with Holy Attack Power equal to 162% of Incantation Scaling. If the incantation is used again immediately afterwards, the second sword's Attack Power is increased to 232% of Incantation Scaling while the beam's Attack Power is increased to 169% of Incantation Scaling for the second cast.

title: Black Blade
text: Costs 44 points of Stamina to perform, with the follow-up costing the same amount of Stamina for a total of 88 points of Stamina if both parts are used. The sword part deals 9 Stance damage and the beam part deals 4 Stance damage. Both the sword itself and the wave it sends out can hit the same target at melee range, meaning that the first cast effectively can have Attack Power roughly equal to 387% of Incantation Scaling while the follow-up cast can have Attack Power equal to 401% of Incantation Scaling. The beam attack applies two debuffs: the first deals damage equal to 0.1% of the target's maximum HP + 1 every 0.1 seconds for 2 seconds (total damage equal to 2% of target's maximum HP + 20) while the second debuff lowers the target's maximum HP by 10% for 15 seconds, signified by a part of their health bar being blocked out with grey.

title: Black Blade
text: The debuff that lowers maximum HP doesn't stack with the Maliketh's Black Blade's skill Destined Death similar debuff, but it does stack with the one inflicted by the Black Knife's skill Blade of Death .

title: Black Blade
text: Patch 1.08 fixed a bug that prevented the follow-up attack from occurring when the Black Sword Incantation was activated with a Sacred Seal in the left hand. Black Blade is incorrectly referred to as Black Sword in this patch note. Patch 1.07.1 the incantation Black Blade is currently missing its follow up attack when cast from the left hand. This issue will be corrected in a future update. The issue was fixed with Patch 1.08. Patch 1.07 reduced stamina consumption, improved turning performance and shortened recovery time, the sword and the wave attack have been changed so that they hit at the same time. Attack power, stamina attack power, and poise damage of each part have been decreased, decreased the number of times the wave part hits large enemies. Prior to this only either the sword attack or the beam attack could hit an enemy.

title: Black Blade
text: The Attack Power of the first sword and beam was decreased from 290% of Incantation Scaling and 252% of Incantation Scaling to 225% and 162% of the same respectively, and the Attack Power of the follow-up sword and beam was decreased from 297% of Incantation Scaling and 260% of Incantation Scaling to 232% and 169% of the same respectively. The Stamina damage to guarding opponents for the first sword and beam was decreased from 190 and 150 to 145 and 115 respectively, and the same for the follow-up sword and beam was decreased from 220 and 150 to 160 and 125 respectively. The Stamina damage to guarding players was split from the PvE values and increased at the same time, going to 181 and 143 for the first sword and beam, and to 200 and 156 for the follow-up sword and beam. The Stance damage of sword attacks and beam attacks were decreased from 10 and 7 to 9 and 4 respectively.

title: Black Blade
text: The Poise damage of sword attacks and beam attacks meanwhile was actually increased, not decreased, going from 100 and 70 to 243 and 108 respectively. Patch 1.04 decreased Stamina consumption and decreased recovery time.

title: Black Blade
text: Ash of War: Seppuku Ash of War: Blood Blade Ash of War: Bloody Slash Bloodflame Blade Vyke's Dragonbolt Unique Skill: Corpse Wax Cutter Unique Skill: Corpse Piler Unique Skill: Destined Death Unique Skill: Eochaid's Dancing Blade Unique Skill: Destined Death Flame, Grant Me Strength Lansseax's Glaive Adula's Moonblade Ash of War: Carian Grandeur Black Knife Fortissax's Lightning Spear

title: Black Flame
text: Black Flame — Type: Incantation ( Godslayer Incantation ); Description: Throws a ball of raging black fire; FP Cost: 18; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Godskin Prayerbook; Buy Price: 7,500; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 20

title: Black Flame
text: Black Flame is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Godslayer Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Black Flame
text: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles . Throws a ball of raging black fire . Charging enhances potency and causes the fireball to explode. Black flame is weighty. After dealing damage, it continues to sap foes' HP for a very short time.

title: Black Flame
text: Purchase: Roundtable Hold / Liurnia of the Lakes / Altus Plateau / Leyndell, Royal Capital / Mountaintops of the Giants Sold for 7,500 Runes by Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either of them the Godskin Prayerbook . Should the prayerbook be given to one of them and then have that instructor die before purchasing this Incantation , then the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price after giving them the respective tutor's Bell Bearing . WARNING: Should both Corhyn and Miriel die before giving either of them the prayerbook then this incantation becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Black Flame
text: Create a small ball of Blackflame to throw, hitting with Fire Attack Power equal to 244% of Incantation Scaling and inflicting a Blackflame effect that deals damage equal to 2% of target's maximum HP + 20, over the course of 2 seconds. Charging the spell increases the Attack Power to 300% of Incantation Scaling.

title: Black Flame
text: Costs 25 points of Stamina to cast. Charging the spell increases the cost to 33 points. Deals 9.1 Stance damage on hit. Charging the spell increases the Stance damage to 11.83. Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 23%, wearing this talisman increases the Attack Power by a total of 41%. Attack Power is boosted by 15% per Godslayer's Seal held in an active hand (2 max). An very strong yet simple spell due to a combination of fast casting speed and percentage-based damage. Since it deals at least 2% of a target's health per cast it can kill anything damageable in 50 casts, though most often much quicker due to the Fire damage it also deals.

title: Black Flame
text: All bosses in Shadow of the Erdtree are resistant to the percentage-based damage of Blackflame , only taking damage equal to 1% of target's maximum HP + 10 over 2 seconds. Messmer the Impaler , Bayle the Dread , and the Promised Consort are even more resistant to the effect, only taking damage equal to 0.7% of target's maximum HP + 7.

title: Black Flame
text: 1.07 : Increased stamina attack power against guarded enemies. Stamina Attack Power against guarding enemies was increased from 100 to 150 for the uncharged version, and from 160 to 210 for the charged version. Against players the Stamina Attack Power was instead increased to 187 for the uncharged version and to 262 for the charged version. 1.04 : Increase damage and the spell can break enemy’s guard more easily. Attack Power was increased from 214% of Incantation Scaling for the uncharged version to 244% of the same, and from 248% of Incantation Scaling for the charged version to 300% of the same. Stamina Attack Power against guarding enemies was increased from 91 to 100 for the uncharged version, and from 118 to 160 for the charged version. Patch 1.03.3 seems to have included an undocumented change which increased the FP cost of this incantation from 15 to 18.

title: Black Flame
text: Fire Serpent , a tracking, Messmerfire variant Flame Sling , a Giants' Flame variant

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Black Flame Blade — Type: Incantation ( Godslayer Incantation ); Description: Enchants right-hand armament with black flame; FP Cost: 15; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Godskin Prayerbook; Buy Price: 6,000; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 17

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Black Flame Blade is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Godslayer Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Black Flame Blade
text: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles . Engulfs Armament held in the right hand with black flame . This incantation can be cast without delay after performing another action. Black flame is weighty. After dealing damage, it continues to sap foes' HP for a very short time.

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Purchase: Roundtable Hold / Liurnia of the Lakes / Altus Plateau / Leyndell, Royal Capital / Mountaintops of the Giants Sold for 6,000 Runes by Brother Corhyn or Miriel, Pastor of Vows after giving either of them the Godskin Prayerbook . Should the prayerbook be given to one of them and then have that instructor die before purchasing this Incantation , the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price after giving them the respective tutor's Bell Bearing . WARNING: Should both Corhyn and Miriel die before giving either of them the prayerbook, this incantation becomes unavailable for that character until a new Journey is started.

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Quickly sheathe the right-hand weapon with Blackflame , granting Fire Attack Power equal to 85% of the seal's Faith -based Incantation Scaling and inflicting an effect that deals damage equal to 2% of target's maximum HP + 20, over the course of 2 seconds. Lasts for 7 seconds and counts as a Weapon Buff .

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Costs 10 points of Stamina to cast. Despite being one of the Godslayer Incantations , this spell, like other spell-based weapon buffs, does not get bonus damage from its associated seal (the Godslayer's Seal for this one). Can have its extremely short duration extended by 30% by the Old Lord's Talisman , to 9.1 seconds. The Blackflame effect is also applied to target's hit by Skills of the buffed weapon, even if those skills don't involve the weapon, such as with Skill: Thunderbolt or Skill: Flame of the Redmanes . Casts considerably quicker if used immediately after a roll, jump, or attack, or when sprinting, letting the user get more out of its short duration. The additional damage from the Blackflame effect will at most be 9% of target's maximum HP + 90 (11.1% + 110 if the Old Lord's Talisman is used).

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Practically though, the bonus damage will probably be around 5% + 50, presuming the user is able to keep on the offense. It's important to note that the duration of Blackflame effects doesn't stack, instead the duration is reset if another hit is landed during an ongoing burn. Due to the extremely short duration of this buff, it's important to keep on the offensive if possible after casting the spell. Should ideally be cast just before an opening in a boss's attacks happens. Outmatched in added Fire Attack Power (i.e. not counting the added Blackflame effect) by Drawstring Fire Grease below 170 Incantation Scaling and by Drawstring Messmerfire Grease below 208 Incantation Scaling. Note that both of these consumable items last considerably longer than Black Flame Blade, even if the Old Lord's Talisman is equipped.

title: Black Flame Blade
text: More specifically, Drawstring Fire Grease lasts for 10 seconds and Drawstring Messmerfire Grease lasts for 25 seconds. Can be used with a quick weapon such as the Dagger , even if it's unupgraded, to deal heavy damage to high-health bosses. All bosses in Shadow of the Erdtree are resistant to the percentage-based damage of Blackflame , only taking damage equal to 1% of target's maximum HP + 10 over 2 seconds. Messmer the Impaler , Bayle the Dread , and the Promised Consort are even more resistant to the effect, only taking damage equal to 0.7% of target's maximum HP + 7.

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Uses the same casting animation as Drawstring Greases, and also share their very short duration (though Black Flame Blade's duration is shorter than even theirs).

title: Black Flame Blade
text: Bloodflame Blade , the other, weaker but much longer lasting Fire -based Weapon Buff Drawstring Fire Grease / Drawstring Messmerfire Grease , similarly quick-casting Weapon Buffs but with longer durations and non-scaling damage Skill: Black Flame Tornado , a skill that also deals Blackflame damage

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Black Flame Ritual — Type: Incantation ( Godslayer Incantation ); Description: Summons a circle of black flame pillars around caster; FP Cost: 30; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Defeat Spiritcaller Snail ( Spiritcaller Cave ); Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 42

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Black Flame Ritual is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Godslayer Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effect 4 Notes 5 Trivia 6 See also

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Superior black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles . Summons a circle of black flame pillars around the caster. Charging increases the size of the circle. The Gloam-Eyed Queen led the apostles. It is said that she was an Empyrean chosen by the Fingers .

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Guaranteed Drop: Mountaintops of the Giants Black Flame Ritual is received upon defeating the Spiritcaller Snail boss in Spiritcaller Cave on the Mountaintops of the Giants . This Snail summons the spirits of a Godskin Apostle and a Godskin Noble .

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Summon a circle of Blackflame around the caster for about 4 seconds, hitting with Fire Attack Power equal to 106% of Incantation Scaling and inflicting an effect that deals damage equal to 2% of target's maximum HP + 20, over the course of 2 seconds, if an enemy touches them. Charging the spell increases the Attack Power to 109% of Incantation Scaling and creates the circle a bit further away from the caster.

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Costs 39 points of Stamina to cast. Charging the spell increases the cost to 51 points. Deals 5 Stance damage per hit. Charging the spell increases the Stance damage to 6.5 per hit. Attack Power is boosted by 15% by the Godfrey Icon if charged. Since charging the spell already increases Attack Power by 3%, wearing this talisman increases the Attack Power by a total of 18%. Attack Power is boosted by 15% per Godslayer's Seal held in an active hand (2 max). The ring can hit an enemy up to 4 times, effectively granting it Attack Power equal to 424% of Incantation Scaling (436% if charged), not accounting for flat defence, and dealing additional damage equal to 5% of target's maximum HP + 20 (since hitting with a new Blackflame effect will just reset the duration of the debuff).

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: This makes the incantation surprisingly usable for attacking, at least against large opponents such as Trolls , since enemies can be tricked into standing inside of the flames. An older instance of Black Flame Ritual isn't removed when a new is cast, though their damage won't stack as efficiently against opponents compared to when their casts are more separated. Significantly harder to use against other players, being primarily useful for forcing them to stay away from the caster or to obscure the caster's other attacks. Be wary of opponent's jumping over the flames or simply running through them, as well as the fact that the charged version's pillars being further out means it's possible to stand close to the caster without being damaged.

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: All bosses in Shadow of the Erdtree are resistant to the percentage-based damage of Blackflame , only taking damage equal to 1% of target's maximum HP + 10 over 2 seconds. Messmer the Impaler , Bayle the Dread , and the Promised Consort are even more resistant to the effect, only taking damage equal to 0.7% of target's maximum HP + 7.

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: 1.06 : Fixed a bug which caused the charged version of “Black Flame Ritual” to consume the same amount of stamina as the normal version 1.04 : Reduced FP cost and increased damage. FP cost was decreased from 36 to 30. Patch 1.03.3 seems to have included an undocumented change which increased the FP cost of this incantation from 24 to 36.

title: Black Flame Ritual
text: Burn, O Flame! Noble Presence

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: Black Flame's Protection — Type: Incantation ( Godslayer Incantation ); Description: Increases physical damage negation; FP Cost: 30; Stamina Cost: 13; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Sir Gideon Ofnir or Twin Maiden Husks; Buy Price: 2,500; Max. Held: 99; Max. Stored: 600; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 30

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: Black Flame's Protection is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Godslayer Incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Strategies 5 See also

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles . Summons black fire within, increasing physical damage negation. However, sacred flasks and other such forms of HP restoration are impaired. The Apostles were all embraced by the Gloam-Eyed Queen , and the black flame was their armor within.

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: Purchase: Roundtable Hold Acquired from Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing after selecting the "about the secret medallion" dialogue option. This option will only appear after the player has obtained both the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right) and Haligtree Secret Medallion (Left) . Can be purchased from the Twin Maiden Husks for 2,500 Runes should the player not talk to Gideon about both medallions before unleashing the Rune of Death .

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: Grants a Body Buff that decreases Physical damage taken by 35% (15% in PvP) while also decreasing all healing received by 20% for 70 seconds.

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: Costs 30 FP per cast. Costs 13 Stamina per cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot to be equipped. This spell reduces Physical damage taken rather than directly increasing damage negation .

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: The total damage reduction can be expressed by the following formula, where PhysicalFortification represents the effect magnitude: T o t a l P h y s i c a l R e d u c t i o n = 100 ( 1 − ( 1 − P h y s i c a l D a m a g e N e g a t i o n × 0.01 ) × ( 1 − P h y s i c a l F o r t i f i c a t i o n ) ) {\displaystyle TotalPhysicalReduction=100(1-(1-{PhysicalDamageNegation}\times 0.01)\times (1-{PhysicalFortification}))} For example, if physical damage negation is 25 at the time of casting, the total reduction against PvE enemies would be 51.25%: P h y s i c a l M a g i c R e d u c t i o n = 100 ( 1 − ( 1 − 25 × 0.01 ) × ( 1 − 0.35 ) ) = 51.25 % {\displaystyle PhysicalMagicReduction=100(1-(1-25\times 0.01)\times (1-0.35))=51.25\%} Against other players, the total reduction would be 36.25%: T o t a l P h y s i c a l R e d u c t i o n = 100 ( 1 − ( 1 − 25 × 0.01 ) × ( 1 − 0.15 ) ) = 36.25 % {\displaystyle TotalPhysicalReduction=100(1-(1-25\times 0.01)\times (1-0.15))=36.25\%}

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: The reduction in healing effective lowers the effectiveness of this spell to only lowering Physical damage taken by 18.75% (and increasing the effective damage taken in PvP by 6.25%), assuming that healing will be used and not accounting for it helping the player survive hits that otherwise would have killed them. Effectively still has its full PvP strength of 15% in no-healing scenarios such as semi-formal duels in the open world or via a Duelist's Furled Finger , and the Duel Arena Combat mode available through the Royal Colosseum in Leyndell, Royal Capital or via Roundtable Hold . The effectiveness of this spell diminishes as physical damage negation increases, offering less benefit when stacked with multiple physical negation sources.

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: This incantation is valuable whenever available since the vast majority of areas will have most of the damage inflicted by enemies as various types of Physical damage. The biggest exception is Liurnia of the Lakes , where Magic damage shares the spotlight. Black Flame's Protection offers greater physical protection than Boiled Crab (35% vs. 20%) and has a slightly longer duration (70 vs. 60 seconds). This spell requires 30 Faith and 1 Memory Slot to be equipped and 30 FP to cast, while the Crab only requires 600 Runes per piece bought. The Boiled Crab is preferable for PvP encounters, as Black Flame's Protection's effect is reduced to 15%. Though Boiled Crab (and the slightly weaker Boiled Prawn ) are potentially accessible much earlier, it's possible to not gain access to them should Blackguard Big Boggart be killed before any of either has been bought from him.

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: The reduction in healing for the Flask of Crimson Tears specifically can be countered with either the Crimson Seed Talisman or Crimson Seed Talisman +1 , setting healing effectiveness to 96% and 104% respectively. Note that this only helps with the flask, as the Heal spells are not affected by either talisman but is affected by the healing reduction.

title: Black Flame's Protection
text: Divine Fortification , effectively a Holy damage negation version Dragoncrest Shield Talismans , a type of talisman granting additional Physical damage negation Flame Fortification , effectively a Fire damage negation version Lightning Fortification , effectively a Lightning damage negation version Magic Fortification , effectively a Magic damage negation version

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: Blessing of the Erdtree — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Grants greater blessing to self and nearby allies; FP Cost: 60; Stamina Cost: 30; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Leyndell, Royal Capital; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 38

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: Blessing of the Erdtree is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Erdtree incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 See also

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Grants a greater blessing to the caster and nearby allies, gradually restoring a large amount of HP . Hold to continue praying and delay activation. The Erdtree once flourished with abundance —yet it was only for a fleeting moment. Such is the course of all life.

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: Loot: Leyndell, Royal Capital Blessing of the Erdtree is located near the Queen's Bedchamber Site of Grace in Leyndell, on the Altus Plateau . WARNING: This item is no longer obtainable after defeating Maliketh, the Black Blade .

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: The caster kneels in prayer, granting health regeneration to themselves and allies within a 15-meter radius, healing 12 HP per second for 90 seconds (1080 HP in total). Nearby Revenants and Revenant Followers lose 3% of their maximum HP plus 10 per second for 30 seconds (90% of their maximum HP + 300 in total).

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: Costs 60 FP per cast. Costs 30 Stamina per cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot to equip. The effect can be delayed indefinitely by holding the casting button, which is useful if an ally is not yet within range. Bandai Namco Entertainment rated it on the first place of the top 5 incantations. [ 1 ]

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: Old Lord's Talisman extends both the duration and total healing by 30%, increasing the total HP restored to 1404.

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: The HP regeneration effect stacks with the Blessed Dew Talisman and Icon Shield , but not with Bestial Vitality , Blessing's Boon , or Crimsonburst Crystal Tear . Blessing of the Erdtree offers the highest healing per second, 50% greater than the second strongest health regeneration buff. However, its high FP cost makes it relatively inefficient.

title: Blessing of the Erdtree
text: Bestial Vitality Blessing's Boon Erdtree Heal Flask of Crimson Tears Sunwarmth Stone ↑ https://www.bandainamcoent.com/news/elden-ring-battle-scars-infographic

title: Blessing's Boon
text: Blessing's Boon — Type: Incantation ( Erdtree Incantation ); Description: Grants blessing to self and nearby allies; FP Cost: 30; Stamina Cost: 30; Memory Slots: 1; Buy Price: 4,000; Int: 0; Arc: 0; Fth: 24

title: Blessing's Boon
text: Blessing's Boon is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Erdtree incantations . Contents 1 Description 2 Acquisition 3 Effects 4 Notes 4.1 Boosting 4.2 Strategies 5 See also

title: Blessing's Boon
text: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations. Grants a blessing to the caster and nearby allies, gradually restoring HP . Hold to continue praying and delay activation. Blessings once fell like tears from the Erdtree, and this incantation is but a lingering remnant of their power.

title: Blessing's Boon
text: Purchase: Liurnia of the Lakes Blessing's Boon is sold by Miriel, Pastor of Vows for 4,000 Runes . Should Miriel die before purchasing this Incantation from him, the player can still purchase it from the Twin Maiden Husks for the same price, after giving them Miriel's Bell Bearing .

title: Blessing's Boon
text: The caster kneels in prayer, granting health regeneration to themselves and allies within a 6-meter radius, healing 8 HP per second for 90 seconds (720 HP in total). Nearby Revenants and Revenant Followers lose 3% of their maximum HP plus 10 per second for 30 seconds (90% of their maximum HP + 300 in total).

title: Blessing's Boon
text: Costs 30 FP per cast. Costs 30 Stamina per cast. Requires 1 Memory Slot to be equipped. The effect can be delayed indefinitely by holding the casting button, which is useful if an ally is not yet within range.

title: Blessing's Boon
text: Old Lord's Talisman extends both the duration and total healing by 30%, increasing the total HP restored to 936.

title: Blessing's Boon
text: The HP regeneration effect stacks with the Blessed Dew Talisman and Icon Shield , but not with Bestial Vitality , Blessing of the Erdtree , or the Crimsonburst Crystal Tear .

title: Blessing's Boon
text: Bestial Vitality Blessing of Marika Flask of Crimson Tears Great Heal Sacred Tear Warming Stone

title: Bloodboon
text: Bloodboon — Type: Incantation ( Blood Oath Incantation ); Description: Scatters bloodflame before caster to set area aflame.; FP Cost: 13; Memory Slots: 1; Obtained: Trade Enia a Remembrance of the Blood Lord; Int: 0; Arc: 17; Fth: 14

title: Bloodboon
text: Bloodboon is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Blood Oath Incantations .

title: Bloodboon
text: Sacred incantation of Mohg, Lord of Blood . Thrust arm into the body of the Formless Mother , then scatter the bloodflame to set the area ablaze. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The mother of truth craves wounds. When Mohg stood before her, deep underground , his accursed blood erupted with fire, and he was besotted with the defilement that he was born into. Patch: 1.07, Changes: FP cost reduced from 15 to 13.

title: Bloodboon
text: Trade the Remembrance of the Blood Lord , dropped by Mohg, Lord of Blood , with Finger Reader Enia . Alternatively, use one of the Wandering Mausoleums with a bell to duplicate one (can only obtain one per playthrough using either method).

title: Bloodflame Blade
text: Bloodflame Blade — Type: Incantation ( Blood Oath Incantation ); Description: Enchants right-hand armament with bloodflame; FP Cost: 20; Memory Slots: 1; Int: 0; Arc: 10; Fth: 12

title: Bloodflame Blade
text: Bloodflame Blade is an incantation spell in Elden Ring . It is one of the Blood Oath Incantations .

title: Bloodflame Blade
text: A Blood Oath incantation, granted by the Lord of Blood . Engulfs armament held in the right hand with bloodflame . This incantation can be cast while in motion. After dealing damage, bloodflame continues to build up onset of blood loss for a very short time.

title: Bloodflame Blade
text: Guaranteed Drop: Liurnia of the Lakes Drops from a Scarab northwest of Rose Church .
